title: Software Engineer (AI Training)
description:
**About The Role**
 What if the code you write could directly shape how the next generation of AI understands and generates software? We're looking for Software Engineers in Stockholm to build, evaluate, and improve AI-generated code — helping train AI systems to think like real developers.
   

  

 Stockholm is one of Europe's most celebrated technology ecosystems — the city that gave the world Spotify, Klarna, and a generation of world-class engineers. Now you can bring that engineering culture to the frontier of AI development, entirely on your own schedule.
   

  

 You'll write solutions, review AI outputs, and provide the expert-level feedback that makes AI coding assistants smarter, safer, and more reliable. This is hands-on engineering work — not theoretical, not bureaucratic, and not boring.
   

  

 This is a fully remote, flexible contract role. If you can write clean code and explain your reasoning, we want to hear from you.
   

  

* Organization: Alignerr
* Type: Hourly Contract
* Location: Remote
* Commitment: 10–40 hours/week


**What You'll Do**
* Write, debug, and optimize code across a range of languages, frameworks, and problem domains
* Review and evaluate AI-generated code for correctness, efficiency, readability, and best practices
* Identify bugs, logic errors, security issues, and performance bottlenecks in AI outputs
* Provide structured, detailed feedback explaining why code works — or doesn't
* Design challenging coding prompts and edge-case scenarios to stress-test AI capabilities
* Compare and rank multiple AI-generated solutions based on engineering quality
* Work independently and asynchronously — fully on your own schedule


**Who You Are**
* Proficient in one or more programming languages (Python, JavaScript, Java, C++, Go, TypeScript, or similar)
* Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and software design principles
* Able to read, write, and reason about code with clarity and precision
* Strong problem-solving instincts and a systematic debugging approach
* Clear written communicator — you can explain technical decisions in plain language
* Self-motivated and reliable when working independently without supervision
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field — or equivalent practical experience


**Nice to Have**
* Experience across multiple languages or tech stacks (full-stack, backend, systems, data engineering)
* Familiarity with AI/ML concepts, LLMs, or prompt engineering
* Background in code review, technical writing, or mentoring junior developers
* Experience with cloud platforms, DevOps, or distributed systems
* Competitive programming, open-source contributions, or side projects that demonstrate your craft
* Advanced degree in Computer Science or related discipline


**Why Join Us**
* Work on cutting-edge AI projects alongside leading research labs
* Fully remote and flexible — set your own hours and work from anywhere
* Freelance autonomy with intellectually stimulating, high-impact work
* Directly influence how AI writes, understands, and reasons about code
* Sharpen your own engineering skills by evaluating diverse problems daily
* Potential for ongoing work and contract extension as new projects launch

title: Software Engineer
description:
As a Software Engineer reporting to Sr. Manager – Software Engineering, you'll play a critical role in designing, building, and maintaining software solutions that power Nasdaq's global technology platforms.
   

  

 You'll thrive in this position if you're collaborative, curious, and passionate about writing clean, scalable code in a fast-paced, high-impact environment.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain robust software applications that support business-critical operations.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams across regions to deliver high-quality technical solutions.
* Contribute to code reviews, technical discussions, and continuous improvement of engineering practices.
* Identify and resolve software issues, ensuring reliability and performance across systems.
* Partner with product and stakeholder teams to translate requirements into scalable, well-structured solutions.


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
* 3–5 years of experience in software development, with strong proficiency in Java.
* Experience using Git for version control in a collaborative development environment.
* Clear communicator with the ability to work effectively in matrixed, global teams.
* Strong problem-solving skills with a focus on delivering quality and impact.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Familiarity with Agile development methodologies and modern software delivery practices.
* Experience with fault-tolerant, distributed and deterministic systems.
* Familiarity with consensus algorithms and coordination mechanisms.


 This position is located in Stockholm, Sweden and offers the opportunity for a hybrid work environment, with at least 3 days per week in-office, subject to change, providing flexibility and accessibility for qualified candidates.
   

  

**Benefits & Rewards**
 We offer a competitive, well-rounded rewards package designed to support the financial, physical, and emotional well-being of our employees and their families (where applicable).
   

  

 The actual pay depends on factors like your skills, experience, qualifications, and location. In addition to base pay, we offer short-term incentives (bonus or commission) and long-term incentives (equity), where applicable.
   

  

 We utilize a structured job architecture and career framework to ensure growth opportunities are transparent, fair, and accessible to all employees. The pay range you see reflects the full salary band for this job level, including room for progression over time.
   

  

 For more information, visit Nasdaq Benefits & Rewards Career Page.
   

  

**Come as You Are**
 Nasdaq is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds and identities.
   

  

 We are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where diverse perspectives, experiences, and identities are valued and celebrated.
   

  

 We ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided with reasonable accommodation throughout the hiring process.

title: Senior Backend Java Developer
description:
**About the Role** 




 We are seeking an experienced Senior Java Developer to join our growing technology team. This is an exciting opportunity for a highly motivated and technically skilled professional who is passionate about building scalable, high-performance applications and contributing to the architecture of modern software platforms.
 



 You will play a key role in designing, developing, and maintaining enterprise-grade solutions while collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to deliver innovative products and services.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Develop, maintain, and enhance high-quality software solutions in line with coding standards, best practices, and approved designs.
* Design and build scalable microservices and backend systems using Java and Spring Boot.
* Collaborate with product managers, QA teams, and fellow developers to define requirements, estimate development efforts, and deliver solutions.
* Contribute to the architecture and evolution of the platform ecosystem alongside the wider engineering team.
* Investigate, evaluate, and implement emerging technologies to improve development efficiency and product performance.
* Deploy and release new features and functionality through established CI/CD pipelines.
* Produce technical design documentation and actively participate in design reviews.
* Conduct unit and integration testing to ensure application quality, reliability, and performance.
* Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and production issues.
* Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.
* Ensure adherence to development processes, standards, and Agile methodologies.



  





**Required Skills & Experience:** 



* Minimum 5+ years' commercial experience in Java development.
* Strong expertise in: Java (including Functional Java and Java Streams), Spring Boot, Microservices Architecture, PostgreSQL, MySQL, CI/CD practices and tools
* Solid understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and software engineering principles.
* Experience working across the full Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC).
* Strong understanding of Agile methodologies, including Scrum.
* Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
* Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment.
* Strong communication skills with fluent written and spoken English.



  





**Desirable Skills:** 




 Experience with any of the following would be advantageous:
 


* Maven
* MongoDB
* AWS
* Event-Driven Architecture
* REST API Development
* Continuous Integration tools and practices

title: Backend / Cloud Developer
description:
**About Justera Group**
 Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.
   

  

**About the Role:**
 We are seeking a talented and versatile Mid-Level Backend / Cloud Developer to join a dynamic project team in Stockholm. In this role, you will play a key part in architecting, developing, and maintaining robust backend services and cloud infrastructure. The ideal candidate brings a strong foundation in modern cloud ecosystems and is highly comfortable integrating AI technologies—specifically
 **Claude AI** 
 —into active development workflows. While your primary domain will be backend and cloud engineering, you are a well-rounded developer who is comfortable stepping in to support frontend tasks on Next.js when needed.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Backend & Cloud Engineering: Develop, scale, and maintain high-performance backend services leveraging Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and Firebase Cloud.
* AI Integration: Actively collaborate on cutting-edge AI initiatives, integrating LLMs (particularly Claude) to enhance system capabilities.
* Full-Stack Support: Contribute to frontend feature development and adjustments as required by project sprint cycles.
* Quality Assurance: Ensure exceptional code quality, optimization, and system reliability through modern development practices.
* Autonomous Delivery: Take ownership of features from conception to deployment with minimal supervision.


**Requirements:**
* 3–5 years of professional software development experience.
* Deep familiarity and hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and Firebase Cloud.
* Proficiency in TypeScript and Next.js.
* Solid conceptual and practical understanding of working with generative AI technologies and APIs.
* Excellent professional English. A basic understanding of the Swedish language is a mandatory requirement for this role.
* Proven ability to work independently, problem-solve proactively, and thrive in an agile environment.


**What We Offer:**
* A dynamic and innovative workplace, driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and a comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Embedded Software Engineer
description:
**Vill du arbeta i ett världsledande, globalt företag inom testning av elkraftsystem med en stark företagskultur och sunda värderingar? Är du en nyfiken person som gillar att lösa komplexa problem med kunden i fokus? Då har du en unik möjlighet att stärka Meggers Embedded Software team.** 




  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Vi söker en erfaren mjukvaruutvecklare där du kommer att bli en del utav vårt Embedded Software team. Hos oss får du arbeta brett inom din roll och vara med genom hela produktens livscykel – från kravställning, systemering till utveckling och felsökning.
 



  





 Arbetsuppgifterna omfattar exempelvis systemering, framtagning av konstruktions specifikationer, koncept och principlösningar, verifiering/test, felsökning och tekniska utredningar. Du kommer också att arbeta med vidareutveckling av befintliga produkter.
 



 Du kommer att jobba i ett nära samarbete med övriga discipliner såsom, elektronikkonstruktion, applikationsutvecklare, testare och produktägare.
 



 Du kommer att arbeta i tekniskt utmanande uppdrag där din mjukvara ligger nära hårdvaran och där prestanda, stabilitet och kvalitet är avgörande.
 



  





**Du erbjuds** 



* Att bli en del av ett företag med låg personalomsättning, stor mångfald och ett gemensamt brinnande intresse för tekniken
* Att vara en del av hela kedjan, från idé till färdig produkt, med stor möjlighet att få vara med och påverka
* En närvarande och engagerad chef – samtliga chefer hos Megger genomgår ledarskapsprogram
* Närvarande och engagerade kollegor
* Att arbeta under samma tak som produktledning, inköp och produktion – unikt i branschen
* Flexibla arbetstider, Friskvårdsbidrag, Företagshälsovård



  





**Vem är du?** 




 Vi söker dig som har minst 5 års erfarenhet utav hårvarunära programmering. Du bör vara lösningsorienterad, trivas med att arbeta i en roll med många varierande moment. Du gillar att förstå system på djupet och trivs bäst när du får arbeta nära tekniken. Du är en lagspelare som trivs i en internationell miljö och har en önskan att växa tillsammans med oss.
 



  





**För att lyckas i rollen ser vi gärna att du har:** 



* Civil- eller högskoleingenjör eller motsvarande inom elektroteknik med minst 5 års erfarenhet som mjukvaruutvecklare för inbyggda system
* Mycket goda kunskaper i både engelska och svenska, i tal och skrift
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt med eget driv, samtidigt som du är bra på att samarbeta.
* Flera års erfarenhet av hårvarunära programmering i C/C++
* Goda kunskaper av realtidssystem och RTOS
* Goda kunskaper om olika kommunikationsprotokoll tex. SPI, CAN, I2C och Ethernet
* Stark problemlösningsförmåga och ett genuint teknikintresse



  





**Meriterande kompetenser/erfarenheter** 



* Erfarenhet utav Cybersecurity och trådlös kommunikation
* Erfarenhet av Yocto, Linux och Linux-baserade system
* Erfarenhet av Git, GitLab/Jenkins eller andra CI/CD-miljöer



  





**Övrig information** 



* Start:
 **Så snart som möjligt, enligt överenskommelse.**
* Omfattning:
 **Heltid**
* Placering:
 **Danderyd**
* Alla anställda på Megger Sweden AB omfattas av kollektivavtal



  





 För att söka denna tjänst behöver du ha tillstånd att arbeta i Sverige. Observera att vi inte tar emot ansökningar via e-post.
 



  





 Sista ansökningsdag är fredagen den 7
 **juli** 
 , men vänligen skicka in din intresseanmälan så snart som möjligt då urval till intervjuer sker löpande under perioden.
 



  





**Om du har frågor om tjänsten vänligen kontakta:** 



* **David Millares, Manager Embedded Software Design**
* **+46 8 510 19 527, david.millares@megger.com**



  





 Vi vill gärna veta mer om dig. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
 



  





**Om Megger** 




  





*Megger är en ledande leverantör av högteknologisk test- och mätutrustning för elkraftsbranschen och bidrar på så sätt till ett mer hållbart och säkert samhälle. Det gör vi genom att hjälpa våra kunder att leverera den elektriska energi du använder varje dag på ett effektivt sätt. Vi utvecklar och tillverkar avancerad hård- och mjukvara för att erbjuda kunder över hela världen en totallösning innehållande support, service och kurser i provning och underhåll av högspänningsutrustning. Megger Sweden AB omsätter 500 Mkr och har ca 140 anställda på kontoret i Danderyd.*

title: Dynamics 365 CE utvecklare
description:
**Att jobba som Dynamics 365 CE utvecklare**
 Som Dynamics 365 CE utvecklare på Skandia får du arbeta med verksamhetskritiska lösningar för kund- och ärendehantering inom både bank- och försäkringsområdet. Plattformen är central för vår affär, och vårt användande sträcker sig över Customer Service, Sales och Customer Insights Journeys.
   

  

 Du blir en nyckelperson i ett agilt team där teknik, affär och användarbehov möts. Din vardag kommer att innehålla utveckling och konfiguration i Dynamics 365 CE, arbete med Power Platform och optimering av integrationer mot andra interna system.
   

  

 Vi har en ambitiös utvecklingsplan för Dynamics och arbetar kontinuerligt med att modernisera vår arkitektur, bland annat genom molnbaserade lösningar i Azure, ständigt med fokus på hållbarhet, skalbarhet och kundnytta. Du blir också en viktig del i vår strävan att ligga i teknikens framkant, både vad gäller plattformen och hur vi arbetar.
   

  

 Du kommer att ingå i en gruppering om cirka 18 kollegor fördelat på 2 agila utvecklingsteam, med roller som utvecklare, mjukvaruarkitekter, testare, scrum masters och produktägare. Vi arbetar tätt tillsammans, med stor öppenhet och en vilja att skapa värde, både för varandra och för våra kunder.
   

  

 Det här är ett team där vänlighet, nyfikenhet och framåt driv är självklara delar av kulturen. I rollen får du vara med och påverka Skandias CRM-system där vi satsar stort med en tydlig riktning framåt.
   

  

 Vi arbetar hybrid vilket innebär arbete på kontoret varvat med distansarbete.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du att rapportera till gruppchef IT kund.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du…**
* Har flera års erfarenhet av utveckling och förvaltning inom Dynamics 365 CE och Power Platform inom komplexa IT-miljöer
* Har god förståelse för Dynamics 365 CE-plattformens möjligheter och begränsningar
* Har god erfarenhet och intresse av integrationer, t.ex. via API:er eller Azure-tjänster
* Har erfarenhet av eller är nyfiken på utveckling inom .NET/C# med en vilja och driv att bygga på din tekniska bredd över tid
* Är van vid att arbeta i en föränderlig miljö där du kontinuerligt får lära dig nytt och utvecklas
* Kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska i tal och skrift


 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av Scrum Master-rollen samt ett intresse för hur AI kan accelerera både din egen och din omgivnings utveckling.
   

  

**Som person**
 Du är en nyfiken och engagerad problemlösare med ett starkt driv att utveckla både lösningar och arbetssätt. Du tar ansvar för ditt arbete, arbetar strukturerat och har lätt för att samarbeta. Du delar gärna med dig av din kunskap och bidrar till en öppen, lärande teamkultur.
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Vi jobbar med löpande urval så tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan redan idag. I ansökan kommer vi att ställa ett antal urvalsfrågor som ligger till grund för första urvalet. För att göra rekryteringsprocessen så rättvis och objektiv som möjligt kommer det att ingå intervjuer, tester, bakgrundskontroll samt digital referenstagning.
   

  

 Vi kommer att återkoppla till alla som söker oavsett om du går vidare eller inte.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kring rollen, vänligen kontakta rekryterande chef Jonas Olsson på jonas.olsson@skandia.se.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kopplat till rekryteringsprocess, vänligen ta kontakt med Talent Acquisition Partner Nina Fazeli på nina.fazeli@skandia.se
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**Mer om IT**
 Vi på Skandia IT är stolta över att vara en kundorienterad enhet som levererar effektiva och säkra lösningar för våra kunder. Med cirka 600 engagerade medarbetare är vi mitt i en spännande transformationsresa, där vi utvecklas tillsammans och har kul på vägen. Framåt tillsammans är vårt motto!
   

  

 Vi arbetar agilt och har sedan 2017 använt oss av SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) ramverket, där leverans och kundvärde alltid står i centrum. Våra tågledningar och team, jobbar verksamhetsbaserat med aktiviteter som sprintplanering, daily stand-ups, team-synk, code reviews och retrospektiv.
   

  

 Var 12:e vecka samlas vi alla i vår ljusa och inspirerande Ljusgård på kontoret i Stockholm för 2 planeringsdagar. Planeringsperioden består av 6 tvåveckorssprintar, där den sista sprinten är en innovationssprint. Här får du chansen att, själv eller tillsammans med ditt team, utveckla och förfina våra system.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer & Engineering Manager
description:
Evam builds mission-critical technology for the people who keep society safe. Our software is used by police, ambulance, fire & rescue, and other public safety organisations to manage complex, time-critical operations. Every day, Evam supports first responders handling hundreds of thousands of life-threatening incidents.
 



  





 We're looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer who is also ready to step into an Engineering Manager role — someone who can architect and ship production code on Monday and coach a team through a tricky delivery on Tuesday. You'll lead a small, focused team while remaining deeply hands-on across our Spring Boot + Kotlin backend and our React + TypeScript frontend.
 



  





 You'll own technical direction for your area of the platform: shaping architecture, setting the engineering bar, breaking down complex problems, and making sure what we build is robust, scalable, and maintainable. You should be senior enough to start a new product codebase from scratch and lay solid foundations, making the right calls on architecture, tooling, conventions, and testing strategy so the codebase stays healthy as the team and product grow. Equally important, you'll grow the people around you — running 1:1s, giving direct feedback, hiring, and creating an environment where senior engineers do their best work.
 



  





 This is more than coding and people management. The software you build will be used by first responders during active incidents - supporting them in the most critical moments of emergency response.
 



  





 AI is a first-class part of how we work at Evam. We expect you to use modern AI coding assistants and agentic tools as a core part of your daily workflow — and to help your team get more leverage from them too.
 



  





 We are on a path to become the leading company in the public safety industry, and we are looking for people who want to be part of that journey and thrive in a high-paced environment. Our team will grow substantially in the coming years, offering you the opportunity to be part of something big from the very beginning.
 



  





**Why Evam** 




 Evam exists to save lives. Thousands of times per day. We build mission-critical software for the people who keep society safe. Our software is used by police, ambulance, fire & rescue, and other public safety organisations to manage complex, time-critical operations. Every day, Evam supports first responders handling hundreds of thousands of life-threatening incidents.
 



  





 You'll join a fast-growing company of highly skilled individuals and play a key role in giving those who protect our societies better tools, built for the most critical moments of emergency response.
 



  





 With a proven product, we are now expanding into new markets, aiming to enhance the efficiency of first responder organizations and, ultimately, safeguard our society.
 



  





 We are on a mission to define the next generation of public safety technology.
   





**Your skills**




**Need to have:** 



* 7+ years of professional software engineering experience, with senior-level depth in both Spring Boot + Kotlin and React + TypeScript
* Proven experience leading engineers — formally as a manager/tech lead, or informally as a senior who consistently raises the bar around them
* Demonstrable experience starting a product codebase from zero and growing it into something that other engineers can sustainably build on
* Strong architectural judgment: API design, data modeling, modularization, testing strategy, and knowing when
 *not* 
 to add complexity
* Comfort across the stack: REST APIs, MongoDB (or other document databases), build pipelines, observability, and modern frontend patterns (hooks, state management, type-safe APIs)
* **AI literacy is a must** 
 — you actively use AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, or similar) in your daily workflow and can show how they change the way you design, build, review, and ship
* Excellent communication in English, both written and verbal — you can write a clear RFC and run a productive code review
* A proactive, ownership-driven mindset and a real care for code quality, reliability, and team health- Motivation to work on software that has real-world impact, globally



  





**Nice to have:** 



* Experience in regulated, safety-critical, or high-availability domains
* Experience hiring and onboarding senior engineers
* Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure), Kubernetes, and modern CI/CD
* Experience introducing AI tooling and practices at a team or org level

title: Senior Software Engineer | Box Team
description:
**Where software meets the physical world**
 In 2022, Budbee and Instabox merged to form Instabee — now home to three consumer brands serving millions of deliveries across Europe. We move fast, we're growing across Scandinavia and continental Europe, and we're not slowing down. Always with the consumer at heart.
   

  

 The Team
   

  

 The Box team owns one of Instabee's most tangible products: our locker network.
   

  

 We build and maintain the full software ecosystem that powers 6,000+ lockers — from cloud backend services to the software running on the physical hardware itself. It's a space where reliability, scalability, and real-world constraints collide daily, and where the gap between a code change and a real-world outcome is remarkably short.
   

  

 We operate as an autonomous, cross-functional team with full ownership of our product lifecycle — from design and development through to deployment and iteration. If you've ever wanted to see your engineering decisions literally open a door, this is that job.
   

  

 What You'll Work On
   

  

 The team’s focus and responsibilities span a wide range of areas, but everything is centered around the user experience at the parcel lockers. This means working with supporting backend solutions (Golang), the user interface at the locker itself (React), cloud services (Google Cloud), and other related applications.
   

  

 With our roadmap mainly centered around the locker experience, much of the engineering work focuses on building and evolving the software that powers the devices themselves. It’s a pragmatic, flexible environment where no two problems look the same.
   

  

**As a Senior Software Engineer, on a daily basis, you'll:**
* Shape the architecture — Contribute to key technical decisions and drive solutions that balance robustness with speed of delivery
* Work across the stack — Hands-on implementation from cloud services to hardware-adjacent software
* Collaborate closely — Partner with product managers, designers, and engineers to refine requirements and build things that matter
* Raise the bar — Code reviews, knowledge sharing, and continuous improvement of systems and processes


 Who You Are
   

  

 You're a pragmatic engineer who enjoys working across boundaries — backend and frontend, software and hardware, ambiguity and clarity. You take ownership, collaborate naturally, and care about how your work functions in the real world.
   

  

**You Bring**
* Senior-level Software Engineering experience
* Proficiency in Golang, or the confidence and track record to pick it up fast
* Experience with working in a Linux environment
* You think in business outcomes, not just technical solutions
* Familiarity with cloud platforms like GCP or similar


**Bonus Points For**
* Experience with React
* Background in IoT or hardware-integrated systems
* Deeper knowledge of Embedded Linux


 The Culture
   

  

 We believe great products are built by teams that take real ownership and understand how their work is used in the world. In the Box team, that's not a platitude — it's the daily reality.
   

  

 You'll work in a highly collaborative, autonomous environment where experimentation is encouraged and fast iteration is the norm. Open communication, continuous learning, and genuine cross-functional partnership are how we operate. You'll have real influence over technical direction and product experience — not just tickets in a queue.
   

  

 What You'll Get
   

  

 Ambitious colleagues, real challenges, and plenty of room to grow.
   

  

**Plus**
 🌇
 **Sky-High Office** 
 Modern, newly renovated with 360° views over Stockholm
   

  

 🍸
 **Rooftop Fridays** 
 Wind down the week at our rooftop bar
   

  

 🥐
 **Monthly Tech Breakfasts** 
 Midweek talks, great food, smart people
   

  

 👾
 **Tech Demos** 
 Regular showcases of the latest innovations
   

  

 🏓
 **Games Room** 
 Ping pong, shuffleboard, foosball, and karaoke
   

  

 ⏰
 **Hybrid Hours** 
 Work patterns that fit your life
   

  

 👶
 **6 Months Parental Pay** 
 Full support when your family grows
   

  

 🎂
 **Birthday Day Off** 
 Your day, your way — every year
   

  

 If building systems that bridge the digital and physical worlds sounds like your kind of challenge, we'd love to hear from you!
   

  

*As part of our commitment to maintaining a safe and trustworthy workplace, all candidates applying to Instabee in Sweden will undergo a background check conducted by Svensk Bakgrundsanalys. This review examines public criminal records and is a mandatory step in our recruitment process. While the results are public information, we handle all data with the utmost confidentiality.*
***Application Review Timeline***
*We review applications on an ongoing basis and aim to keep you updated throughout the process. Please note that we will be pausing our recruitment activities during the summer holidays from July 6th through August 3rd. We will be in touch with all candidates after we return, and we appreciate your patience during this time.*
 Instabee Group, with consumer-facing brands Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy, brings together years of experience in delivery. Today, Instabee Group is present in five markets, serving thousands of online merchants and millions of consumers with seamless home deliveries and convenient parcel locker deliveries, using the best fuel available. With smart technology, a strong focus on sustainability, and a secure supply chain, Instabee has become a trusted partner for online merchants and a preferred choice for consumers.

title: Pega Developer
description:

 We are seeking an experienced
 **Senior Pega Developer (PCSSA)** 
 to join our client's team in Stockholm. The ideal candidate will have extensive hands-on experience in designing, developing, and implementing enterprise applications using the Pega platform. You will work closely with business stakeholders, architects, and cross-functional teams to deliver scalable and high-quality solutions while adhering to Pega best practices and agile methodologies.
 


 Key Responsibilities
 * Design, develop, and implement applications using the
 **Pega Platform** 
 .
* Collaborate with business and technical stakeholders to gather and analyze requirements.
* Develop scalable and reusable components following

 .

* Design and implement

 with internal and external systems.

 for data modelling, queries, and integrations.

 and contribute to technical design discussions.

* Work in an

 and actively participate in sprint ceremonies.


 Mandatory Requirements
