title: UX/UI Designer till Statligt företag
description:
#### **OM JOBBET**


Som Senior UX/UI Designer blir du del av kundens nordiska produktteam där du utvecklar och förbättrar digitala kundupplevelser för app och webb. Du arbetar genom hela designprocessen – från användarinsikt till färdig design – i nära samarbete med produktägare, utvecklare och intressenter i Sverige och Finland. Arbetet är hybridbaserat från Solna med fokus på mobila gränssnitt.

#### **ARBETSUPPGIFTER**


I rollen arbetar du hands-on som senior specialist genom hela designprocessen. Du bidrar till ett stabilt och kvalitativt designarbete där din erfarenhet gör skillnad i det dagliga utvecklingsarbetet.


Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter inkluderar:

* Självständigt ta fram UX/UI-lösningar för app och webb från användarinsikt till färdig design
* Planera och genomföra användarintervjuer, användartester och analys av användarbeteenden
* Skapa användarflöden, informationsarkitektur, interaktionsmönster och prototyper
* Utforma användarvänliga och visuellt genomarbetade gränssnitt i linje med designriktlinjer
* Förvalta och vidareutveckla Vattenfalls designsystem tillsammans med teamet
* Delta aktivt i A/B-tester och konverteringsoptimering (CRO)
* Samarbeta med produktägare, utvecklare och intressenter i en nordisk kontext

#### **ERFARENHETER OCH EGENSKAPER**

**Krav:**

* Gedigen erfarenhet av UX/UI-design för digitala produkter med praktisk app-design
* Stark förmåga att ta fram interaktionsdesign och visuell design för app och webb
* Erfarenhet av att omsätta affärskrav och användarbehov till digitala gränssnitt
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att driva och facilitera A/B-tester och användartester
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med och utveckla designsystem
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska

**Personliga egenskaper:**

* Handlingskraftig och tar initiativ för att driva frågor framåt
* Kommunikativ och trygg i samarbete med olika intressenter
* Strategiskt och analytiskt tänkande med förmåga att se helheten
* Förmåga att anpassa kommunikation efter mottagare
* Självständig i att driva designarbete från idé till implementation

#### **ÖVRIGT**

**Start:** 16 augusti 2026

**Omfattning:** Heltid, 40 timmar/vecka

**Plats:** Solna (Hybrid)

**Varaktighet:** Till 31 december 2026

#### **TID FÖR ANSÖKAN**


Låter detta som något för dig? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag – vi intervjuar löpande!

#### **OM D-SOURCE**

*Your source to IT*  

D-Source är ett modernt konsultbolag med bredden mellan helpdesk, infrastruktur och Tech. Vi har lång erfarenhet av att förstå kunders IT-behov! Tveka inte att höra av dig om du är intresserad av att ta reda på mer.


Vad kan vi göra för dig och vad kan vi göra tillsammans?

#### **INGET JOBB FÖR DIG?**


Lugnt! Du kan alltid registrera dig förutsättningslöst på D-Source jobbsida genom att Connecta med oss. Då hamnar du i vår kandidatdatabas och får koll på våra kommande aktuella tjänster.

title: UX Designer
description:
**Uppdragsbeskrivning**


Vår kund inom offentlig sektor söker en senior UX-designer som ska stödja utveckling och vidareutveckling av myndighetens digitala tjänster och e-tjänster. Konsulten ska säkerställa att tjänsterna utformas utifrån användarnas behov, verksamhetens mål samt höga krav på tillgänglighet, säkerhet och effektiv digital förvaltning.


Konsulten kommer att arbeta genom hela designprocessen, från analys och problemförståelse till koncept, prototyp, validering och införande. Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med verksamheten, utvecklingsteam och andra relevanta intressenter.


Uppdraget kräver en person som självständigt kan driva UX-arbetet i komplexa miljöer med flera målgrupper, regelverk och beroenden.

##### **Obligatoriska krav**

##### **Konsulten ska ha:**


Minst 5 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete inom UX-design eller interaktionsdesign.


Minst 3 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av utveckling av komplexa digitala tjänster, e-tjänster, självbetjäningslösningar eller verksamhetskritiska webbapplikationer.


Erfarenhet från minst två större uppdrag där konsulten haft en ledande UX-roll och ansvarat för att planera och driva UX-arbetet från behov till färdig lösning.


Erfarenhet av arbete i tvärfunktionella agila utvecklingsteam tillsammans med exempelvis utvecklare, testare, arkitekter och verksamhetsexperter.


Erfarenhet av att arbeta i organisationer med många intressenter, komplexa användarflöden samt höga krav på kvalitet, säkerhet och förvaltning.


Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att designa enligt WCAG 2.1 AA eller senare.


Kunskap om krav kopplade till lagen om tillgänglighet till digital offentlig service, DOS-lagen.


Erfarenhet av att omsätta tillgänglighetskrav till praktisk design.


Mycket god kompetens i Figma.


Dokumenterad erfarenhet av workshopledning och behovsinsamling med flera intressenter.


Relevant eftergymnasial utbildning inom UX-design, interaktionsdesign eller motsvarande från universitet, högskola eller yrkeshögskola.

##### **Meriterande krav**


Erfarenhet av arbete inom offentlig verksamhet.


Erfarenhet av tjänstedesign.

title: Senior Business Analyst
description:
**Senior Business Analyst**
---------------------------

**About the Assignment**
------------------------


Are you passionate about turning business needs into smart digital solutions? We are looking for a Senior Business Analyst who thrives at the intersection of business, technology, and transformation.


In this role, you will play a key part in driving digital initiatives, creating business value, and helping organizations improve the way they work. You will collaborate with business stakeholders, product teams, and technical specialists to ensure that ideas are transformed into successful implementations.


This is an excellent opportunity for someone who enjoys creating clarity, driving continuous improvement, and making a real impact through analysis and collaboration.

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

* Collaborate with Digital Product Managers and business stakeholders to understand goals, challenges, and opportunities.
* Gather, analyze, and document business requirements and translate them into actionable insights for digital teams.
* Support the design and implementation of digital solutions that create measurable business value.
* Work closely with Product Owners, Developers, Architects, and UX Specialists in an agile environment.
* Contribute to prioritization, roadmap planning, and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Act as a trusted link between business and technology, creating alignment and driving progress across teams.

**Required Qualifications**
---------------------------

* Proven experience working as a Business Analyst or in a similar role within digital, IT, or transformation environments.
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to structure complex information into clear recommendations.
* Experience gathering, documenting, and managing business requirements.
* Solid understanding of business processes, digital products, and Agile ways of working.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to build trust and collaborate effectively across multiple functions and disciplines.
* A proactive, curious, and improvement-oriented mindset.

**Personal Attributes**
-----------------------


We believe you are a structured and analytical professional who enjoys solving complex business challenges. You are comfortable working with stakeholders at different levels of the organization and have a natural ability to bridge the gap between business and technology.


You thrive in collaborative environments, enjoy driving change, and are motivated by delivering solutions that create tangible business value.

**Additional Information**
--------------------------


The assignment is subject to mandatory background checks prior to onboarding. These checks may include identity verification, right-to-work confirmation, education verification, financial screening, criminal record checks (where permitted by local legislation), and other relevant compliance verifications.


Applications are reviewed continuously, and the assignment may be filled before the application deadline.


Gothenburg, Sweden


Assignment Period: August 3, 2026 – December 31, 2027


On-site Assignment (100%)

description:
**Start:** 08/16/2026
  
**End:** 12/31/2026
  
**Target rate:** 750 sek/h
  
Solna (Stockholm) Hybrid
  
  

Som Senior UX/UI Designer blir du en del av ett nordiskt, tvärfunktionellt produktteam. Du samarbetar med kollegor och stakeholders i Sverige och Finland och arbetar med att utveckla och förbättra våra digitala kundupplevelser för webb och app, med särskilt fokus på mobila gränssnitt.
  
Rollen har ett huvudsakligt UX‑fokus, men du bidrar även med din kompetens inom visuell design (UI). Du arbetar genom hela designprocessen – från att förstå användarbehov till att ta fram färdig design – i nära samarbete med produktägare, utvecklingsteam och olika intressenter inom våra affärsteam.
  
Om rollen
  
I rollen arbetar du som senior specialist inom UX/UI, där din erfarenhet bidrar till ett stabilt och kvalitativt designarbete i teamet. Du arbetar huvudsakligen hands‑on och är en del av det löpande utvecklingsarbetet, där du bidrar med analys, struktur och genomarbetade designlösningar.
  
Du är även delaktig i att använda, förvalta och vidareutveckla vårt designsystem, som är en gemensam grund för våra digitala gränssnitt över flera team och marknader.
  
  

Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter
  
  

Självständigt arbeta med UX/UI för nya och befintliga funktioner för app och webb i nära samarbete med produktägare, utvecklare och andra intressenter i en nordisk kontext
  
Ta fram designlösningar från användarinsikt till färdig interaktionsdesign och visuell design, i nära samarbete med våra utvecklingsteam
  
Planera och genomföra användarintervjuer, användartester och analys av användarbeteenden, i syfte att säkerställa god användbarhet och tillgänglighet
  
Skapa användarflöden, informationsarkitektur, interaktionsmönster och prototyper
  
Utforma tydliga, användarvänliga och visuellt genomarbetade gränssnitt i linje med designriktlinjer och varumärke
  
Bidra till förvaltning och vidareutveckling av vårt designsystem
  
Delta aktivt i vårt arbete med A/B‑tester och konverteringsoptimering (CRO)
  
  

Vi erbjuder dig en spännande och varierad tjänst där ditt arbete kommer att ha en direkt påverkan på kundupplevelsen för såväl befintliga som nya kunder.
  
  

Vem är du?
  
Vi söker dig som är handlingskraftig och trivs med att ta initiativ – du driver frågor framåt med engagemang och ser till att idéer omsätts i konkreta förbättringar. Du är också kommunikativ och trygg i samarbetet med andra, du har förmågan att anpassa din kommunikation efter mottagaren. Med ett strategiskt och analytiskt förhållningssätt har du förmågan att se helheten, förstå komplexa samband och fatta välgrundade designbeslut baserade på användarinsikter, data och verksamhetens mål.
  
  

**Skills:**  

Kvalifikationer
  
  

**Vi söker dig som har:**  

Gedigen erfarenhet av UX/UI‑design för digitala produkter, med praktisk erfarenhet av app‑design
  
Stark förmåga att ta fram interaktionsdesign och visuell design för app och webb
  
Erfarenhet av att omsätta affärskrav och användarbehov till väl fungerande digitala användargränssnitt i nära samarbete med utvecklare, produktägare och andra intressenter
  
Erfarenhet av att självständig driva och facilitera A/B tester, kundintervjuer och användartester i samarbete med olika intressenter och samarbetspartners
  
Erfarenhet av att arbeta med och bidra till att utveckla designsystem
  
Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska
  
  

**Meriterande:**  

Erfarenhet av att arbeta i nordiska eller internationella team
  
Erfarenhet från energibranschen eller annan kundnära, komplex verksamhet
  
  

**Education:** 3-5 års designerfarenhet

title: Content Creator – Halmstad
description:
Är du skicklig på att göra komplex teknik enkel att förstå? Nu söker vi en Content Creator till ett spännande uppdrag där du får kombinera teknisk dokumentation, pedagogiskt innehåll och videoproduktion för moderna embeddedlösningar.

**Om uppdraget**
----------------

I rollen ansvarar du för att skapa och utveckla innehåll kopplat till konfiguration via studio- och portallösningar. Du producerar både teknisk dokumentation och pedagogiskt videomaterial som hjälper användare att förstå och använda produkterna på ett effektivt sätt.


Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med tekniska experter och utvecklingsteam för att säkerställa att informationen är korrekt, användarvänlig och lättillgänglig.

**Dina arbetsuppgifter ️**
--------------------------

* Skapa och underhålla teknisk dokumentation för produkter och lösningar
* Producera pedagogiskt innehåll i form av text, guider, instruktioner och videomaterial
* Omvandla tekniskt avancerad information till tydligt och lättförståeligt innehåll
* Arbeta med dokumentationsplattformar baserade på HTML
* Samverka med tekniska team för att säkerställa kvalitet och korrekthet i materialet

**Förväntade leveranser**
-------------------------

* Tydlig och användarvänlig teknisk dokumentation
* Instruktionsmaterial och guider för konfiguration och användning
* Pedagogiska videor och demonstrationer
* Strukturerat innehåll anpassat för dokumentationsplattformar

**Din profil**
--------------

### **Obligatoriska kompetenser**

* Erfarenhet av att omvandla tekniskt avancerat innehåll till tydlig och lättillgänglig information
* Erfarenhet av dokumentationslösningar baserade på HTML
* Erfarenhet av Paligo eller liknande dokumentationsverktyg
* Erfarenhet av att skapa tekniskt informationsmaterial
* Erfarenhet av videoproduktion, demos eller liknande pedagogiskt innehåll

### **Meriterande färdigheter**

* Förståelse för embedded system
* Erfarenhet av kommunikationslösningar i tekniska miljöer
* Erfarenhet av UX eller arbete med användarupplevelse
* Erfarenhet av Profinet eller liknande kommunikationsprotokoll

**Personliga egenskaper**
-------------------------

* Pedagogisk och kommunikativ
* Strukturerad och kvalitetsmedveten
* Självständig med god samarbetsförmåga
* Nyfiken på teknik och användarupplevelse

**Information**
---------------

**Plats:** Halmstad  

**Distansarbete:** Hybrid (3 dagar på plats per vecka)  

**Omfattning:** 80–100 %  

**Start:** 2026-08-10
  

**Möjlighet till förlängning:** Möjlighet till förlängning finns  

**Sista ansökningsdag:** 2026-06-25


Sway Sourcing är en innovativ rekryteringspartner som specialiserar sig på att matcha rätt talang med rätt företag – snabbt och effektivt. Vårt huvudfokus ligger inom Ekonomi, Administration, HR, Marknad och IT, men vi har även den breda expertis och flexibilitet som krävs för att leverera skräddarsydda rekryteringslösningar inom alla branscher.


Trots att vi är en relativt ny aktör har vi redan byggt förtroende hos många av Sveriges största företag och arbetar både nationellt och internationellt. Med baser i Sverige och Spanien erbjuder vi en unik kombination av lokal expertis och global räckvidd. Vårt starka nätverk och djupa branschinsikter gör oss till en självklar partner för företag som vill ligga steget före i sin rekrytering.

title: Business Analyst
description:
**We’re looking for a Business Analyst for a company in Gothenburg.** **Start is in August 3rd, 17 months limited contract to begin with. This role is 100% onsite in Gothenburg.**

**Business Analyst**


Are you passionate about turning business needs into smart digital solutions? We are looking for a Business Analyst who thrives at the intersection of business, technology, and change. In this role, you will help shape initiatives that improve the way people work, create real business value, and support digital transformation in a collaborative and forward-looking environment.

**Why Join Us**


This is an opportunity to work in a role where your analysis, structure, and communication skills will have a visible impact. You will collaborate with engaged stakeholders, digital product teams, and technical specialists to solve meaningful business challenges. If you enjoy creating clarity, driving improvement, and helping teams move from idea to implementation, this role offers both variety and influence.

**What You Will Do**

* Partner with Digital product managers and business stakeholders to understand goals, pain points, and opportunities for improvement.
* Translate business needs into clear requirements, process flows, and actionable insights for digital teams.
* Support the design and implementation of digital solutions that create measurable business value.
* Work closely with Digital product managers, Digital product owners, developers, architects, and UX specialists in a collaborative setup.
* Contribute to prioritization, roadmap planning, and continuous improvement across initiatives.
* Act as a trusted link between business and digital, helping create alignment and momentum.

**What We Are Looking For**

* Experience working as a Business Analyst or in a similar role within digital, IT, or transformation environments.
* Strong analytical skills and the ability to structure complex information into clear recommendations.
* Experience gathering and documenting business requirements and facilitating stakeholder dialogue.
* Good understanding of business processes, digital products, and Agile ways of working.
* Excellent communication skills and the ability to build trust across different functions and perspectives.
* A proactive, curious, and improvement-oriented mindset.

**You Will Thrive in This Role If You**

* Enjoy connecting strategy, business needs, and digital execution.
* Like creating structure in complex environments.
* Are motivated by collaboration and working with people across different disciplines.
* Want to contribute to change that makes a real difference for the business.

**Why This Opportunity Stands Out**


You will join a role where you can influence outcomes, work with skilled colleagues, and contribute to meaningful digital development. We are looking for someone who wants to make a difference through insight, collaboration, and a genuine interest in improving how business and technology work together.


This is a full-time consultant position in Gothenburg through Incluso. Start is August 3rd, 17 months limited contract to begin with. This role is 100% onsite in Gothenburg.


For more information about this role, please contact Marianne Nilsson recruiter at Incluso.

title: Senior Business Consultant / Business Analyst
description:
**About Justera Group**  

Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.  

  

**About the Role:**  

We are seeking an experienced Senior Business Consultant / Business Analyst to support digital transformation and operational excellence initiatives within a dynamic, technology-driven environment. This role is ideal for a professional who excels at bridging business needs with digital solutions and thrives in cross-functional, collaborative settings.


As a key partner to business stakeholders and digital teams, you will play a critical role in identifying opportunities, defining requirements, and driving initiatives that create measurable business value.

**Key Responsibilities:**  

Collaborate with business stakeholders, Product Managers, and Product Owners to understand strategic objectives, challenges, and improvement opportunities.

* Elicit, analyze, and document business requirements, user needs, and process improvements.
* Translate business needs into clear functional requirements, process flows, user stories, and actionable recommendations.
* Support the design, implementation, and continuous improvement of digital products and solutions.
* Work closely with developers, architects, UX specialists, and other cross-functional team members throughout the delivery lifecycle.
* Facilitate workshops, stakeholder meetings, and requirement-gathering sessions to ensure alignment and clarity.
* Contribute to roadmap planning, prioritization activities, and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Act as a trusted liaison between business and technology teams, ensuring successful communication and execution.
* Monitor solution effectiveness and identify opportunities for optimization and increased business value.

**Requirements:**  

Minimum 5 years of experience as a Business Analyst, Business Consultant, or similar role within digital, IT, or transformation environments.

* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to structure complex information into clear insights and recommendations.
* Proven experience gathering, documenting, and managing business requirements.
* Solid understanding of business processes, digital products, and technology-enabled transformation.
* Experience working in Agile environments and collaborating with multidisciplinary teams.
* Excellent communication, facilitation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to build strong relationships and influence decision-making across different organizational levels.
* Proactive, curious, and improvement-oriented mindset.

**What We Offer:**

* A dynamic and innovative workplace driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: UX/UI Designer
description:

* Erfarenhet av att självständig driva och facilitera A/B tester, kundintervjuer och användartester i samarbete med olika intressenter och samarbetspartners

title: Technical Writer
description:
Here is a possibility to contribute to MSAB’s product communication and customer enablement by producing product documentation to support product strategy, release readiness, usability, and customer adoption. As a bonus, you will contribute to creating a safer world.

**The job**


As our Technical Writer, you will be responsible for planning, producing, and maintaining high-quality technical documentation for MSAB products, including user guides, installation guides, release notes, and supporting product information.


The role is located in our Stockholm office and works closely with Product Management, UX, R&D, QA, Technical Support, and other subject-matter experts to collect, verify, and structure product information.

**Duties and Responsibilities**

* Create and maintain technical product documentation for MSAB software and solutions, including user guides, feature descriptions, quick start guides, troubleshooting content and release-related documentation.
* Write and update release notes for new functionality, improvements, defect corrections, limitations, and customer impact.
* Review, verify, and quality assure documentation to ensure technical accuracy, consistency, correct terminology, and adherence to style guides.
* Maintain documentation in relevant tools and formats, including structured documentation environments such as MadCap Flare as well as the Office suite.
* Plan and coordinate documentation work across several parallel product and release tracks to meet agreed deadlines.
* Manage translation of documents, with translation agencies as well as automatic AI translation processes.
* Create clear user-focused UI copy in co-operation with UX designers.

**Who you are**


We look forward to hearing you tell us about your strong technical understanding, your excellent writing skills and ability to explain technical concepts clearly, adapting the message to different target audiences and levels of expertise.


Your strong analytical ability enables you to break down complex functionality into logical documentation presenting it pedagogically. You are curious and self-driven with ability to research and ask relevant questions.


You will have contact with several stakeholders and in that you will benefit from your collaborative and service-minded personality.


There is much more to say about our growth plans, product development, how we create a safer world, and our helpful and supportive culture. But we save that for the interview.


Apply now to take this opportunity to contribute to a safer world.


For more information about MSAB: About us - MSAB

### **What we can offer**


Create a safer world with us!


As one of the world’s leading digital forensics companies, MSAB leads the way in pioneering advancements that contribute to making our world safer.


Your work at MSAB will bridge the gap between technology and justice. You will be inspired to go beyond your comfort zone, and you will deal with challenging and meaningful projects. When you join us, you become part of a global team that aspires to create a safer digital future, one breakthrough at a time.


We can offer you an exciting work environment, where we value being innovative, acting ethically and delivering results in everything we do while our customers' needs are at the center. We are proud to be a fast-growing international company with more than 20+ nationalities and we work with things that really make a difference.


Every day at MSAB is an opportunity to redefine the future of digital forensics.

### **Are you up for the challenge?**

title: Technical Program Manager
description:
### **Var med och skala Advanias Trusted AI Platform**


Vi bygger Yggdrasil, en **Trusted AI Platform för reglerade nordiska verksamheter**. Inom AI Product & Engineering växer antalet initiativ, team och beroenden, och vi söker vi dig, en **Technical Program Manager**, som vill ta ett centralt ansvar för den operativa leveranskoordineringen[ES1.1].


Här blir du navet mellan teknik, produkt och verksamhet. Du skapar tydlighet i komplexa sammanhang, ser till att rätt information når rätt intressenter och gör det möjligt för Tech Leads och ingenjörer att fokusera på utveckling och tekniska beslut. Rollen passar dig som trivs med att driva arbete framåt genom struktur, kommunikation och förtroende, snarare än genom formellt mandat.

#### **Det här får du göra**


Som **Technical Program Manager** ansvarar du för att koordinera leverans över flera parallella program och initiativ inom AI Product & Engineering. Du arbetar nära Head of AI Product & Engineering, Head of AI Transformation, Tech Leads, AI Engineers, Data Engineer och UX Designer i ett distribuerat team som arbetar huvudsakligen på engelska.


I rollen kommer du att:

* Planera, koordinera och följa upp leveranser över flera team och initiativ
* Identifiera, dokumentera och hantera beroenden i tid
* Driva uppföljning, eskaleringar och beslutsförberedelser när leveransrisker uppstår
* Facilitera sprintplanering, retrospektiv, demos och andra återkommande ceremonier
* Skapa tydlighet kring ansvar, prioriteringar, status och nästa steg
* Äga den operativa intakeprocessen för nya initiativ
* Strukturera inkommande behov och omvandla dem till beslutsunderlag
* Kartlägga risker, kommunicera konsekvenser och föreslå alternativa handlingsvägar
* Översätta tekniska frågeställningar till affärsmässiga konsekvenser för ledning och intressenter


Beslut om prioriteringar och tekniska vägval fattas i nära samarbete med ansvariga Tech Leads. Din roll är att skapa bästa möjliga förutsättningar genom att säkerställa att besluten baseras på korrekt, aktuell och välstrukturerad information.

#### **Så bidrar du i rollen**


Det här är en roll för dig som kan skapa framdrift i en miljö där processer fortfarande utvecklas. Du tar ansvar för att planera, prioritera och genomföra ditt arbete inom givna ramar, samtidigt som du håller ihop detaljerna utan att tappa helheten.


Du bygger förtroende genom att vara tydlig, transparent och påläst. Det märks i hur du sätter dig in i behov från produkt, teknik och verksamhet, omsätter dem till relevanta underlag och rekommendationer och följer upp att arbetet leder till kvalitet och värde. När risker eller beroenden uppstår agerar du tidigt, synliggör konsekvenser och hjälper team och intressenter att komma vidare.


Rollen bygger också på ett aktivt samarbete. Du skapar och vårdar relationer över teamgränser, söker stöd och specialistkunskap när det behövs och använder ditt nätverk för att lyckas i uppdraget. Genom att bidra med struktur, transparens och ett lösningsorienterat arbetssätt stärker du både teamets leveransförmåga och förutsättningarna för Yggdrasils fortsatta utveckling.

### **Det du har med dig**


För att lyckas i rollen har du byggt upp en stabil grund inom teknisk leverans och är van vid att koordinera arbete som spänner över flera team och intressenter. Du rör dig obehindrat mellan teknik och affär och trivs i miljöer där struktur, tydlighet och samarbete är avgörande.


Du har erfarenhet av att:

* arbeta i en roll som Technical Program Manager, Delivery Manager eller liknande, där du samordnat leverans över tid
* koordinera flera team eller initiativ, med förståelse för beroenden och leveransflöden
* verka i en teknisk kontext som mjukvaru eller produktutveckling, teknisk projektledning eller IT leverans
* arbeta enligt agila arbetssätt och är bekväm med sprintplanering, retrospektiv och backlog koordinering
* hantera intake, prioritering eller styrning tillsammans med flera intressenter
* omsätta teknisk komplexitet till tydliga affärsmässiga konsekvenser
* navigera i moderna tekniska landskap med plattformar, molntjänster och infrastruktur


Du kommunicerar obehindrat på engelska, både i tal och skrift utöver svenska.


Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av exempelvis AI eller ML relaterade produkter, arbete i reglerade verksamheter, internationella eller distribuerade team, eller verktyg som Azure DevOps, Jira eller Linear. Erfarenhet av svenska samt certifieringar som PMP, PRINCE2 eller SAFe är också ett plus.

##### **Här kan du utvecklas vidare**


Du behöver inte kunna allt från start. Hos oss kan du bygga vidare på din kompetens inom AI plattformar, AI infrastruktur, on premises AI miljöer, Sovereign AI, dataresidenskrav samt specifika verktyg och arbetssätt inom AI Framework.

#### **Därför är rollen viktig**


Initialt kommer ditt arbete att fokusera på att skapa struktur och tydlighet i leveransen av Yggdrasil. Du kommer att vara med och vidareutveckla intakeprocessen, stärka koordineringen mellan team och initiativ och bidra till bättre överblick över beroenden, risker och status.


Genom ditt sätt att skapa framdrift, samla rätt information och bygga förtroende mellan teknik, produkt och verksamhet bidrar du till att teamet kan arbeta mer förutsägbart och fokuserat. På så sätt blir du en viktig del av AI Product & Engineerings fortsatta tillväxt och av arbetet med att skala Advanias AI plattform för verksamheter med höga krav på tillit, kvalitet och struktur.

### **Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!**

Visa gärna ditt intresse så snart som möjligt då vi intervjuar löpande. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och synsätt, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och stärker såväl effektivitet som kreativitet i vårt arbete.


Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår våra slutkandidater en obligatorisk bakgrundskontroll, en för oss kvalitativ kontroll inför ett anställningsbeslut. Advania samarbetar med Ljung & Sjöberg i ärenden kopplat till alkohol-, drog- och spelproblematik och är en certifierad "Proaktiv Arbetsplats".


Tveka inte att höra av dig om du har några frågor eller funderingar.️
company_description: Advania är ett techbolag som utformar skräddarsydda lösningar och skapar hållbara värden genom smart användning av teknik.

title: Senior Data Scientist in Image Analysis
description:
We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist in image analysis to join Navinci and build scalable, automated pipelines for spatial interactomics. You will take strong ownership in designing and advancing computational methods, with a focus on creating robust, reproducible workflows that incorporate rigorous quality control and leverage deep learning to address complex biological questions. The work will support both internal R&D and external collaborations.


You will be part of a highly skilled, and growing team, playing a key role in advancing pipeline development and computational innovation. The role requires both independent problem-solving and effective collaboration in a dynamic environment, helping position Navinci at the forefront of spatial biology and emerging AI technologies.
  

  

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, deploy and maintain scalable, automated analysis pipelines and reproducible workflows with robust quality control for spatial interactomics data.
* Develop novel computational methods and apply deep learning to address complex biological questions and enable new analysis capabilities.
* Build internal tools and contribute to best practices in pipeline design, reproducibility, and code quality.
* Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams and external partners to translate biological problems into computational solutions.
* Mentor and guide junior team members while contributing to a collaborative, adaptive, and high-performing team environment.
* Work effectively in a dynamic environment with adaptability, independence, and strong collaboration, while staying current with advances in spatial omics and AI (e.g., agentic/LLM-based workflows).

**Qualifications**

**Required:**

* PhD in Computational Biology, Bioinformatics, Computer Vision, or a related field (or equivalent industry experience).
* Strong understanding of spatial omics data and associated analysis challenges.
* Demonstrated ability to design and develop robust, reproducible computational methods and pipelines, including components such as image processing, clustering, spatial analysis, statistical analysis and data visualization.
* Strong proficiency in Python, with experience developing production-quality code for data analysis and pipeline development.
* Proven, hands-on experience in developing and applying deep learning models, using machine learning frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, Scikit-learn).
* Ability to independently solve complex, open-ended problems.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills in interdisciplinary environments.

**Preferred:**

* Industry experience in image analysis methods and/or pipeline development is a strong plus.
* Experience with agentic workflows, AI agents, or LLM-based systems.
* Experience applying best practices in scientific programming and/or software engineering (e.g., testing, debugging, version control, CI/CD).
* Experience with GPU programming and performance optimization.
* Experience with high-throughput computing such as HPC or cloud computing.
* Experience with tool development, UI/UX, or containerization (e.g., Docker).

**What We Offer**

* Opportunity to shape scientific direction in a cutting-edge company.
* Agile teams with fast decision-making and direct impact.
* Dynamic environment with growth and leadership potential.
* Close collaboration across R&D, product, and commercial teams.

**Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.**

title: SAP ABAP FIORI Developer
description:
* Help design, build and continuously improve the clients online platform.
* Research, suggest and implement new technology solutions following best practices/standards.
* Take responsibility for the resiliency and availability of different products.
* Be a productive member of the team.


 Requirements
   

  

* SAP Technical Consultant responsible for translating functional designs and business requirements into technical solutions using technologies such as ABAP, SAP Fiori, CAP, RAP, and SAP HANA Native.
* Developing and implementing technical specifications, interpreting functional requirements, creating and executing program objects, and performing unit testing and other relevant testing activities.
* Up to 6 years of experience as an SAP Technical Consultant.
* Good technical breadth across multiple SAP technologies and platforms.
* Strong knowledge of SAPUI5, JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3.
* Experience with SAP Fiori Elements, Neptune DXP, annotations, CDS Views, and SAP UX design principles.
* Strong understanding of SAP OData services, REST APIs, and SAP Gateway development.
* Backend development expertise in ABAP, including CDS Views, AMDP, and RAP, enabling full-stack SAP Fiori development.
* Knowledge of SAP S/4HANA architecture and UI integration scenarios.
* Ability to analyze complex business requirements and translate them into effective technical solutions.
* Strong problem-solving, communication, and collaboration skills.
* Develop and implement technical specifications based on functional requirements.
* Design, build, test, and maintain SAP technical solutions and program objects.
* Execute unit testing and support other testing activities.
* Collaborate with functional consultants, business users, and technical teams to deliver high-quality solutions.
* Guide and support colleagues where required and contribute to knowledge sharing within the team.
* Swedish language proficiency (spoken and written) in accordance with SUA requirements.
* Must have lived in Sweden for at least five years due to security requirements.


 Benefits
   

  

* A challenging, innovating environment.
* Opportunities for learning where needed.

title: UI Designer - Gaming
description:
We are looking for a hands-on UI Designer to join one of our exciting gaming clients.
   

  

 In this role, you will work closely with cross-functional product pods consisting of designers, developers, and other stakeholders, delivering high-quality user experiences through fast-paced, iterative development cycles.
   

  

 We are looking for someone who is highly execution-oriented, able to ramp up quickly, and comfortable taking ownership from day one. This is a production-focused role where speed, collaboration, and pragmatism are key.
   

  

**Start: Mid/End-August
   

  

 Duration: 31 december with possible extension**
**Location: Stockholm**
**The role**
 We are looking for a UI Designer with the ambition to work with games in both browser and mobile apps (iOS and Android). You are a strong game enthusiast. You know how to design engaging and user-friendly game layouts. Furthermore, you know how to create highly immersive and engaging expressions that catch the players’ attention. Your emphasis is on UI elements, artwork, motion, and transitions, but you also have a great understanding of game flows and design concepts.
   

  

 As a UI Designer, you will work closely with other UI designers, 3D designers as well as our tech teams. You will play a big part in taking the visuals and game experience to the next level, and make sure we keep our design cohesive and immersive.
   

  

 Innovation and exploration will be part of your daily work. You actively use your knowledge and imagination to further improve your own and others' work. You will collaborate and work at our office in Stockholm in a friendly atmosphere where team skills are highly appreciated.
   

  

**Key Requirements**
* You have proven experience of designing successful games.
* You have been working as a UI designer for at least 3+ years.
* You’re a strong visual designer with a good understanding of game flows and game concepts.
* You are self-motivated and always want to challenge yourself and others.
* You like to work in a flexible and innovative environment.
* You are ready to work in a fast-paced, scaling organization.
* You have experience designing and prototyping with AI


**Nice to Have**
* Experience with motion and sound design.
* Background in the gaming industry.

title: Head of Design
description:
Build something monumental for Healthcare!
   

  

 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 As Head of Design at Tandem, you’ll lead and elevate the craft of product design across the company. You’ll work closely with Product, Engineering, and company leadership to shape not only how our products look and feel, but how we discover opportunities, validate ideas, and build products users love.
   

  

 Together we'll be shaping what the future of health interfaces look like. Enabling clinicians to focus on giving care rather than computers and enabling patients to understand and navigate their care journey. This role is about setting a high bar for product design, developing our designers, improving our systems and workflows, and helping define what exceptional AI-native product design should look like.
   

  

 This is a role for someone with exceptional product design judgment, a strong track record of shipping meaningful products, and the ability to help others raise their game. You’ll represent design at the leadership level while remaining close enough to the work to contribute when needed.
   

  

 We’re a fast-moving team that values momentum, ownership, and iteration. This role is a great fit for someone who cares deeply about product quality, thrives in ambiguity, and wants to shape the future of design in an AI-first environment. This is not a traditional management role focused on org charts and large teams. We’re still early, and the design team is currently small. Instead, this role is about setting a high bar for product design, developing our designers, improving our systems and workflows, and helping define what exceptional AI-native product design should look like.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Lead and evolve the overall design craft at Tandem
* Mentor and develop product designers through feedback, collaboration, and coaching
* Represent the design function in leadership discussions and help shape company-wide product decisions
* Work closely with Product and Engineering leadership to shape product principles, direction and execution
* Establish and improve product discovery practices, including research, prototyping, validation, and user feedback loops
* Contribute hands-on to product and interaction design when needed
* Help define how AI can improve both the user experience and the design process itself
* Raise the bar for usability, product thinking, consistency, and visual quality across the company
* Improve how design collaborates with engineering and product teams
* Create clarity and alignment, adding momentum around design decisions in a fast-moving environment


**What You Bring**
* Significant experience designing digital products with strong product and user intuition
* Exceptional attention to detail and a high bar for product quality
* Experience leading or mentoring designers, formally or informally
* A track record of personally driving meaningful product work from discovery through delivery
* Deep experience running user research, testing, prototyping, and validation as core parts of the product development process
* Strong systems thinking and experience improving design workflows and team effectiveness
* Comfort working closely with engineers and understanding technical constraints
* Ability to balance strategic thinking with hands-on execution
* Strong communication skills and ability to give thoughtful, actionable feedback
* Experience operating in fast-moving environments with evolving priorities
* Experience working in highly collaborative product organizations where designers, engineers, and product managers work closely together
* A strong sense of ownership and genuine care for the craft of product design
* Experience making design simple and unified across multiple complex product lines


**Bonus Points**
* Experience designing AI-native products
* Experience building AI-native design processes
* Experience in healthtech
* Experience working in early-stage startups or scaleups
* Comfort engaging in technical discussions and designing within real engineering constraints


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

**Our Interview Process Consists Of 4 Stages**
* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Design focused interview
* Follow-up interview with our CTO and co-founder
* Home case and presentation at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch and a presentation to experience our our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 30 days/year of paid vacation
* Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag)
* Parental top up
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


*We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*
 Culture at Tandem
   

  

 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Design Director
description:
**Are you passionate about creating exceptional user experiences while inspiring a talented creative team to thrive?**
 We are looking for a
 **Design Director** 
 who balances strategic design vision with empowering team management and a pragmatic, execution-focused mindset. We have a bold ambition to be the undisputed #1 service in the eyes of our consumers. To get there, we need a leader who has successfully built and elevated design practices before—someone who knows what "great" looks like, both in the final user experience and in the best-in-class ways of working that get us there.
   

  

 You will play a fundamental role in translating our consumer-centric strategy and ambition into world-class design execution that drives real user, business, and brand impact.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 As the Design Director at Instabee, your mission is to embed user-centricity into our cross-functional initiatives and workflows, implement insights-driven design practices, and lead and develop our team of product and brand designers. You will collaborate closely with colleagues and stakeholders in strategy, product, analytics, tech, and operations. Together with your peers in Consumer, you will establish consumer ambassadorship and center of excellence - ensuring the consumer experience is top-of-mind in everything we do.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities Fall Into Three Key Pillars**
* Drive Design Strategy & Transformation
* Develop and continuously hone the design practices at Instabee to achieve our high consumer experience ambitions, desired brand position, user-centricity, efficiency, and business outcomes.
* Champion the end-to-end user perspective across all development phases, from discovery and design execution to post-launch optimization.
* Demonstrate the value of great design for our user experience and business goals, building trust, credibility and the strong internal relationships needed to give design a strong voice in company decisions.
* Ensure our design organization stays on the forefront of the craft: exploring and putting emerging methodologies and technologies into practice.
* Lead and Empower the Design Team
* Recruit, coach, develop, and lead a high-performing, multidisciplinary team of product and brand designers working with teams and stakeholders across the organization.
* Oversee brand and product design for Growth, Operations, Markets, and other key teams. Translate strategic business objectives and priorities into clear design strategy, adapting resources and capabilities to effectively support the organization and focus where it matters most.
* Champion high standards for design execution. Ensure design output is cohesive, high-quality, and clearly connected to user and business goals.
* Deliver Senior Design Excellence
* Keep one foot in the craft, driving own high-impact product and UX/UI design work - leading by example and showcasing best practices.
* Raise the bar for design and design processes across digital, physical and human interactions, ensuring we deliver "brilliant basics" enhanced by targeted signature “wow moments” that differentiate us.
* Act as a strong facilitator bringing cross-functional experts together to solve complex consumer challenges and drive user-centric innovation.


**Your Profile**
* 8+ years of experience in senior consumer-focused design or product UX/UI roles within a fast-paced service, product, or tech environment.
* A proven track record of design execution that drives clear user, business, and brand impact.
* Solid experience building, leading and elevating multidisciplinary design teams. Skilled at unlocking the potential of different individuals and design disciplines.
* A working-leader mindset, with a passion for keeping your own senior design craft sharp and a desire to lead by example.
* Strong change management capabilities, with a history of successfully integrating design best practices into cross-functional work and influencing without formal ownership.
* A systems-thinking approach, allowing you to see the full customer journey across touchpoints while seamlessly moving between high-level strategic alignment and hands-on operational details.
* Great communication, facilitation and leadership skills, enabling you to build trust, inspire teams, and confidently navigate complex cross-organizational environments as a strong voice for the consumer and the business value of design.


**What You’ll Get**
 We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. If you like changes and want to set new processes and ways of working - this is the place for you!
   

  

**Benefits**
 Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:
   

  

* Sky-High Office: Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
* Puppy Friendly: Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
* Fun & Games: Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
* Parental Pay for Six Months: Step away from work and provide the best care and love to your little one.
* A Day Off on Your Birthday: We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year!
* Hybrid setup and flexible working hours


**Get to know us**
 In 2022, Instabee was founded after combining Budbee and Instabox - two leading last-mile delivery companies with three consumer-facing brands: Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy. Instabee serves millions of consumers across Europe with convenient deliveries and is on track to become the leading European e-commerce enabler. Always with the consumer at heart.
   

  

 We’re fast, both in terms of parcel delivery and when it comes to growing our business. So far our journey has taken us from Sweden to the rest of Scandinavia and parts of continental Europe, but we have no plans on stopping anytime soon. As we continue to expand, the complexity of Instabee grows in parallel. With that in mind, we’re now looking for you to help us on the journey ahead.
   

  

*This recruitment process consists of background checks via Svensk Bakgrundsanalys as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.*
**We are reviewing applications continuously. However, please note that due to the summer holiday period, the recruitment process will be paused from June 26th to August 3rd. We will get back to all candidates after we return.**
 Instabee Group, with consumer-facing brands Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy, brings together years of experience in delivery. Today, Instabee Group is present in five markets, serving thousands of online merchants and millions of consumers with seamless home deliveries and convenient parcel locker deliveries, using the best fuel available. With smart technology, a strong focus on sustainability, and a secure supply chain, Instabee has become a trusted partner for online merchants and a preferred choice for consumers.

title: Senior Product Manager, Sharing & Social
description:
In the Experience Mission, we design Spotify’s consumer experience—end to end, moment to moment, across every screen, platform, and partner integration. On this team, our mission is to show up wherever people are being social — across the platforms, surfaces, and moments where they're already expressing themselves and connecting with others — and make it effortless to bring audio into those moments. That means being present in the feeds, messages, and communities where culture moves, giving listeners the tools to express who they are through what they hear, and creating the loops that turn shared content into a new connection, a new fan, or a new Spotify user.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The team sits within PPX and owns Spotify's sharing surfaces and off-platform social presence: from the core share sheet to partner integrations, social formats, and the growth loops that bring new listeners in. You'll work closely with platform partners, business development, feature-owning teams and cross-functional engineering and design teams. In this role, you’ll shape how Spotify shows up across the social platforms of today and the future. You’ll be the face of product across our social strategic partners, while owning end-to-end product execution.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Own the end-to-end vision and roadmap for how Spotify content is shared, discovered, and amplified across platforms
* Shape the strategy for sharing, from core sharing functionality to new social formats, collaborative features, and growth loops
* Explore how emerging platforms and evolving user behaviors influence sharing, especially across Gen Z and global audiences
* Identify opportunities to position Spotify at the intersection of audio and social culture through new product bets
* Define clear success metrics to understand how sharing drives acquisition, engagement, and retention
* Build strong relationships with external platform partners to unlock new integrations and experiences
* Collaborate with Business Development and cross-functional teams to translate partnerships into meaningful product outcomes
* Lead cross-functional teams across engineering, design, data, and research, creating clarity and momentum
* Bring forward new ideas on how AI can enhance sharing experiences, from personalization to content creation


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have 5+ years of product management experience working on consumer-facing products at scale
* You understand how content spreads online and have a strong perspective on social platforms and digital culture
* You’ve worked with external partners or platform ecosystems and can translate those relationships into product impact
* You build trust across teams and bring people together to move complex work forward
* You’re comfortable using data to inform decisions, including experimentation and user behavior analysis
* You communicate clearly and adapt your message depending on the audience
* You have experience building or contributing to growth loops, sharing features, or social-driven products
* You’re curious about how AI can shape future user experiences and are eager to explore its potential


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! For this role, you can be within the EMEA region as long as we have a work location (excluding France due to on-call restrictions).
* This team operates within the Central European and GMT time zone for collaboration.


 Our global benefits
   

  

* Extensive learning opportunities, through our dedicated team, GreenHouse.
* Flexible share incentives letting you choose how you share in our success.
* Global parental leave, six months off - for all new parents.
* All The Feels, our employee assistance program and self-care hub.
* Flexible public holidays, swap days off according to your values and beliefs.

title: Product Manager, Platform Tooling
description:
Mission Statement
   

  

 The Platform team creates the technology that enables Spotify to learn quickly and scale easily, enabling rapid growth in our users and our business around the globe. Spanning many disciplines, we work to make the business work; creating the infrastructure, tooling, frameworks, and capabilities needed to welcome a billion customers.
   

  

**About The Team**
 You’ll join a team building shared web tooling, frameworks, and operator-facing products that power Spotify’s internal financial workflows. Our mission is simple (but not easy): make complex work easier, smoother, and more intuitive for our operators, while keeping our infrastructure scalable and easy to build on.
   

  

 We focus on creating a consistent, thoughtful experience across internal tools and connected SaaS systems, helping finance operators move seamlessly between products every day. Alongside mature platforms, we’re also building new workflow and task management experiences, with a growing investment in AI-powered capabilities to support smarter decision-making.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Contribute to the product vision and roadmap for shared web tooling and operator-facing products used by finance teams
* Support and evolve a portfolio of internal platforms and workflow systems, from established tools to new capabilities
* Work closely with R&D and end users to understand needs, validate problems, and deliver meaningful solutions
* Lead product discovery for new features and improvements, focusing on usability, clarity, and operator efficiency
* Help shape AI-assisted capabilities within workflows, ensuring they are useful, transparent, and trustworthy
* Partner with engineers to define shared web frameworks and components that enable other teams to build efficiently while maintaining UX consistency
* Balance short-term delivery with long-term platform thinking, including scalability, reliability, and maintainability
* Communicate clearly with stakeholders to align on priorities, trade-offs, and outcomes
* Collaborate closely with engineering and design to support a healthy, high-performing team environment


 Who You Are
   

  

* You enjoy collaborating with cross-functional partners and driving outcomes through strong relationships
* You are experienced with, or curious about, building operator-facing or workflow-driven products and simplifying complex systems
* You are comfortable working closely with engineers and can engage in technical discussions around system design and architecture
* You have a solid understanding of modern AI/ML concepts such as large language models, prompt design, evaluation, and their trade-offs
* You understand how AI can support human decision-making while maintaining transparency and trust
* You learn quickly and synthesize inputs from users, data, and technical contexts to inform decisions
* You communicate clearly and adapt your storytelling to different audiences
* You care deeply about user-centered, data-informed product development
* You are interested in platforms and shared tooling, and how they enable teams while maintaining a strong user experience
* You have experience with internal tools, financial systems, or workflow-based products, or you’re excited to learn in this space
* You are comfortable navigating ambiguity and influencing decisions through insight


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in Stockholm
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home


 Our global benefits
   

  

* Extensive learning opportunities, through our dedicated team, GreenHouse.
* Flexible share incentives letting you choose how you share in our success.
* Global parental leave, six months off - for all new parents.
* All The Feels, our employee assistance program and self-care hub.
* Flexible public holidays, swap days off according to your values and beliefs.

title: Group Product Manager, Messaging
description:
Messaging is a business-critical system at Spotify. It sits between many message senders and a shared pool of users across several channels (e.g. in-app, push, email, and emerging channels), delivering more than 70 billion impressions per year.
   

  

 The Messaging team operates within the Freemium Funnel Area, where product, engineering, design, insights, and marketing collaborate to shape how users engage with Spotify across monetization experiences. We are responsible for audience reach, messaging governance, campaign delivery, and the platforms that enable Spotify teams to communicate with users at scale — reliably, responsibly, and effectively.
   

  

 We have ambitious plans to evolve Messaging from a delivery layer into an intelligent, governed platform that reasons about what to send, to whom, and when — balancing user experience with business outcomes. We are looking for a Group Product Manager to help lead this transformation.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Set the vision, strategy, and roadmap for Messaging capabilities spanning audience reach, governance, campaign automation, and emerging engagement surfaces
* Lead and support a group of Product Managers building scalable platform solutions that evolve Messaging from operator-configured execution into intelligent, value-informed decisioning
* Drive the governance layer for Spotify’s messaging ecosystem by defining how competing business objectives — including conversion, engagement, retention, and upsell — are balanced across channels and user segments
* Lead the development of message classification systems, cross-domain signal integration, and attribution frameworks that enable continuous learning and optimization
* Build and protect audience reach through push notification recovery, opt-in optimization, and expansion into new off-platform channels such as WhatsApp
* Establish observability, monitoring, and alerting capabilities that make messaging performance visible to operators, stakeholders, and leadership
* Partner closely with engineering, design, and insights teams to deliver high-impact platform capabilities with speed and quality
* Collaborate with Growth, R&D, Content, and Marketing stakeholders to align priorities, governance principles, escalation paths, and messaging best practices
* Champion platform thinking across teams by promoting reusable capabilities, enforcing standards, and reducing structural limitations tied to manual configuration
* Inspire teams with a clear product vision while staying close enough to execution to remove blockers and drive meaningful outcomes


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have experience building or leading messaging products at consumer scale, ideally in environments where multiple business teams compete for shared user attention
* You have led product strategy end-to-end, from defining vision through execution and measurable business impact
* You are experienced navigating ambiguity and connecting governance, infrastructure, and user experience initiatives into a clear strategic direction
* You know how to use experimentation, user research, attribution modeling, and market insights to inform product decisions
* You have experience building platform products that support both internal operators and external user experiences
* You understand the balance between business optimization and protecting user experience, and can design systems that support both
* You collaborate effectively across product, engineering, design, insights, legal, and executive stakeholders
* You communicate clearly and can adapt your storytelling to audiences ranging from engineers to senior leadership
* You support and grow high-performing Product Managers by creating clarity, momentum, and accountability
* You are comfortable diving into details when needed to unblock teams and accelerate execution
* You bring a thoughtful perspective on how AI can improve workflows, product thinking, and decision-making responsibly
* You care deeply about building durable, long-term value over short-term optimization


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London, UK or Stockholm, Sweden
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be opportunities for in-person collaboration, while still allowing flexibility to work from home
* This team operates within the EST and GMT time zones for collaboration


 Our global benefits
   

  

* Extensive learning opportunities, through our dedicated team, GreenHouse.
* Flexible share incentives letting you choose how you share in our success.
* Global parental leave, six months off - for all new parents.
* All The Feels, our employee assistance program and self-care hub.
* Flexible public holidays, swap days off according to your values and beliefs.
