* Strong backend development experience with Node.js or similar
* Proven experience building scalable and reliable cloud services
* Solid understanding of distributed systems and asynchronous architectures
* Experience with infrastructure as code and modern CI/CD practices
* Experience designing and integrating APIs
* A product-oriented mindset with a focus on real user value



  





 Just as importantly, you bring a strong sense of ownership. You approach problems in a structured and pragmatic way, communicate clearly, and collaborate well with others. You care about building systems that not only work today, but continue to work tomorrow.
 



  





**Bonus points** 




  





 Experience with AWS services such as SQS, SNS, DynamoDB, Lambda, or Aurora will help you get up to speed quickly, as will familiarity with Docker or Kubernetes in production environments. If you’ve worked with high-traffic or low-latency systems, or have experience with identity, access management, or security in CI/CD pipelines, that’s a plus.
 



  





**Why Sitoo** 




  





 We are forward thinkers. By turning curiosity into knowledge - and knowledge into continuous improvement - we break new ground and shape the future of retail.
 



 We believe in an inclusive culture where everyone feels like they belong. We support each other, win together, celebrate success together, and overcome challenges together.
 



 Today, we are close to 115 dedicated experts with a positive and solution-oriented mindset. Most importantly, we take care of each other, and we never forget to have fun.
 



  





*This is a hybrid role based in Stockholm or Gothenburg. Please note that we are currently unable to offer relocation support for this position, so you’ll need to hold a permanent residence permit in Sweden.*

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
**Google Cloud Journey as a Senior Data Engineer at Codento** 




  





 Do you want to be among the best of Google Cloud technology and be an integral part of growing new business in Sweden, as well as our Nordic growth journey? Do you thrive in an empathetic, low-hierarchical, self-directed, and entrepreneurial work environment? If so, Codento might have the perfect opportunity for you!
 



 At Codento, we are dedicated to delivering exceptional value to customers across diverse industries through the power of cloud technology, software solutions, and AI.
 



 Google Cloud stands out as the fastest-growing cloud platform, and the demand for expertise in this domain is soaring. As our Swedish team expands, we're on the lookout for a talented Senior Data Engineer to tackle complex consulting projects.
 



  





  





**Your tasks during our growth journey:** 




  





 As a Senior Data Engineer at Codento, you work in responsible consultant positions by planning and utilizing the opportunities brought by cloud technologies to help our customers.
 



 This means you’ll be challenged with different problems within the AI and Cloud landscape, which you solve with the help of other Codento experts.
 



  





 You work with cloud technology tools that deepen and expand your already possessed know-how. You will learn a lot, especially about Google Cloud, and that is also expected of you in this position.
 



  





 You will also be working closely with our friends at Google Cloud as well as our Codento Nordic teams.
 



  





 Read the next section to learn what this means technology-wise.
 



  





  





**When you join us, we expect you to have:** 




  





**Mus** 
 t
 **-haves** 



* Strong skills in Data Engineering technologies (Designing end-to-end data pipelines, data warehousing, transactional and NoSQL databases, integrations/APIs, data modeling)
* Python and SQL skills are essential
* Google Cloud experience
* Proven experience in working with different stakeholders and a desire to understand the customer’s business
* Excellent communication skills



  





  





**It would be great if you also had experience in some of these** 



* Having a strong understanding of the consulting/service business
* Track record of leading projects/teams
* Know-how in Business Intelligence tools
* Valid Google Cloud Certification
* Growth / entrepreneurial mindset
* Swedish language capabilities



  





  





**Why should you choose Codento?** 




  





 We provide an intelligent and empathetic work environment where you can thrive and advance in modern technologies while working on captivating problems with our customers.
 



  





 Our culture is founded upon certain principles, ensuring a consistent focus on growth of our consultants and the company. Here’s what we expect from everyone and of course a glimpse of what kind of culture we offer you:
 



  





 We look for individuals with an attitude to embrace change and a high level of ability to learn new things, allowing you to maintain industry-leading technical skills alongside our team. We strongly support and encourage Google Cloud certifications. Completion of certifications is celebrated and you have significant support from both the company and your colleagues throughout the certification process.
 



  





 You will be empowered in a self-directed environment, where we expect you to be proactive and master the big picture of complex projects. The other side of the coin is that we offer a lot of flexibility, provided that all customer expectations are met.
 



  





 Ability to see the larger context ensures you deliver great business impact for our clients and the company. Furthermore, clear communication, encompassing speaking, writing, and the ability to give and receive feedback, is essential for the success of our team. This also guarantees that you'll be working alongside some very sharp people.
 



  





 When you join Codento, you join a brilliant team of technology experts who are welcoming and empathetic.
 



  





  





**Interested? Wondering about something?** 




  





 Apply now – it will not take much of your time! The form is easy and quick to fill out.
 



 At least leave either your CV or/and LinkedIn profile and answer the multiple choice questions. You can also write a short cover letter if you want.
 



  





 If you want to know more about us, please visit our website. There you will find many customer cases and blogs from which you can reflect on whether we’re a good fit for you. :)

title: Software and Solution Architect
description:
**Join EQT Tech’s Architectural function, where you’ll play a critical role in future-proofing and scaling one of our cross-functional value streams—Fintech.**
 This is a unique opportunity to design and drive the technology supporting our financial operations — ensuring seamless integrations, efficiency, and innovation. If you're a strategic thinker with a strong technical foundation and a passion for designing scalable systems, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**About The Tech Team – Fintech Value Stream**
 The Fintech Value Stream strives to improve and automate key financial processes to deliver a best-in-class experience for a broad range of business domains. We’re a cross-functional team collaborating closely with stakeholders across EQT to ensure data and technology strategically support business outcomes. Our team includes tech leads, data professionals, product managers and architects who together shape the future of finance operations through scalable, data-driven solutions.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 As a Software and Solution Architect, you will play a key role in shaping EQT’s technical landscape within the Fintech Value Stream. Your primary responsibility will be to collaborate with Tech Leads, Engineers, and external partners to design and implement solutions that drive efficiency and scalability across EQT’s investment technology.
   

  

 Beyond your work in the Fintech Value Stream, you'll also collaborate closely with peers in the Architecture function to shape EQT Tech's long-term architectural direction, ensuring consistency, reusability, and strategic alignment across value streams.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Partner with tech leads and engineers to support the Fintech Value Stream in new projects & initiatives, engaging in technical discussions with both third-party service providers and internal teams to ensure a structured approach to solution development
* Assess the current architecture, team capabilities, and resource allocation to determine the best approach for future implementations
* Develop new architectural solutions and enhance existing ones to ensure they are harmonized, scalable, and efficient for all of EQT
* Establish technical standards, best practices, and improved ways of working across EQT’s Tech teams
* Collaborate with other Value Streams (Investment & Client) and Platform Teams to define interfaces, ownership, and capabilities within the Fintech domain
* Design system integrations, ensuring seamless connectivity between internal systems, new external systems, and vendors
* Work closely with the Head of Architecture and the Head of Fintech, supporting key strategic initiatives


**Who are you?**
 We’re looking for an experienced Software and Solution Architect with a strong technical foundation and a strategic mindset. You should have a passion for problem-solving, system design, and technical leadership. You likely have 8–12 years of experience across software engineering and architecture, including time spent designing systems in regulated or data-sensitive environments.
   

  

**Desired Skills & Experience**
* Strong software engineering background, with hands-on experience designing and maintaining complex, high-availability systems that handle sensitive data
* Strong understanding of system integrations, APIs, and data architectures
* Proven ability to drive implementation from initial requirements to high-level solution design and progress tracking
* Strong leadership and coaching skills, with the confidence to take a firm stance in technical discussions
* Excellent communication skills, able to engage effectively with key stakeholders and external partners
* Proactive mindset, with a desire to learn, adapt, and drive continuous improvement
* Curiosity about applying AI and advanced analytics to drive business value and innovation


**Nice-to-haves**
* Hands-on experience with modern data stacks and frameworks (e.g., dbt, Snowflake, SQL, Fivetran)
* Familiarity with financial systems such as Netsuite, Kyriba, Hazeltree, MRI, or Aaro, and BI tools like PowerBI or Hex


**What We Offer**
* A fast-paced and dynamic work environment at a leading global investment firm
* The opportunity to work with cutting-edge technology and develop the future of EQT’s financial tools
* A collaborative and inclusive company culture where innovation is encouraged
* Regular hackathons, workshops, and learning opportunities to develop new skills
* Competitive compensation and benefits package
* A vibrant office environment in central Stockholm


**Inclusion at** 
**EQT**
*Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact. Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.*
**About EQT**
*EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of over three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR ‌ 270 billion in total assets under management (EUR ‌ ‌141 billion in fee-generating assets under management), within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.*
*More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

 Follow EQT on LinkedIn, X, YouTube and Instagram*

title: Forward Deployed Engineer
description:
Build something monumental for Healthcare!
   

  

 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You love making things work. You're not in love with a specific solution or technology, but rather delivering value to users.
   

  

 At Tandem, Forward Deployed Engineers are the ones who bridge the gap between
 *the product demo* 
 and
 *real clinicians delivering better more efficient care* 
 . You’ll take on whatever stands in the way of our product’s real-world impact, debugging integrations, tweaking deployments, writing code to fill the gaps, and making sure everything runs smoothly in our customers’ environments. The learnings and abstractions you build along the way will set the foundation for the next generation of the product offering.
   

  

 Making things work for real is often messy & painful - but that’s what makes it fun! The prestige comes from happy customers not using the latest shiny dev tool.
   

  

 You’ll see firsthand how the tech you build actually changes how healthcare works, and you’ll become one of the people that truly understand both the technical and operational sides of what we do.
   

  

 This role is perfect for someone who’s obsessed with solving problems, who codes because they love it, and who cares more about
 *impact* 
 than tech stack. It’s a role for builders - people with founder energy, who want to learn fast, ship fast, and see their work make a difference immediately.
   

  

 If that sounds like you, we’d love to meet you.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Work with deploying, integrating, and optimizing our product in customer environments.
* Debug and solve complex, real-world problems across infrastructure, APIs, data flows, RPA, and configuration.
* Write clean, pragmatic code to adapt and extend our systems for each unique use case.
* Collaborate directly with clinicians, partners, and our internal teams to remove blockers and make deployments seamless.
* Shape the next generation of our product such that the next rollout delivers more value, more smoothly.
* Continuously identify, automate, and improve the painful parts of deployment so we can scale smarter next time.


**What You Bring**
* Deep love for programming and problem-solving.
* Curiosity that borders on obsession - you like understanding why things work (or don’t).
* A bias toward action - you’d rather get things done than talk about them.
* Comfort working in ambiguity and high velocity.
* A mindset that leans toward ownership, creativity, and future-founder energy.


 Bonus Points
   

  

* Experience integrating or deploying complex products in healthcare.
* Any other language skills than a fluency in English is a plus, especially German.
* Solid experience coding in Python, TypeScript, or C#.
* Experience with Robotic Process Automation (RPA) in the web or Windows context.


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

**Our Interview Process Consists Of 4 Stages**
* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineering team
* System Design Interview at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch and a Product focused System Design interview to experience our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.
* Follow-up interview with our CTO & Co-Founder


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 30 days/year of paid vacation
* Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag)
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


*We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*
 Culture at Tandem
   

  

 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Datacenter Network Engineer
description:
We’re looking for a
 **Datacenter Network Engineer** 
 to join us at Telia Cygate.
   

  

 Do you have deep expertise in network virtualization from Cisco and VMware? Do you want to use your experience to help shape and secure the network infrastructure of tomorrow?
   

  

 My name is Greg Szuh and I lead the Managed Network unit. Here, we bring together skilled specialists, architects, and service owners within networking, forming the core of Telia Cygate’s managed network services business. We are now looking for a senior Network Engineer with a Data Center focus who wants to grow, share knowledge, and contribute in a collaborative and supportive environment.
   

  

**What you’ll do**
 You will work as a Network Engineer in a central team, with a focus on our Data Center services within Managed Services.
   

  

 In this role, you will work with modern and complex environments, contributing to both daily operations and long-term development. Your responsibilities include lifecycle management, as well as projects such as onboarding and offboarding customers and services. You will also work with configuration, deployment, and troubleshooting of underlay/overlay architectures and associated security solutions.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with experienced colleagues and other teams, contributing to cross-functional deliveries that often span areas such as security, cloud, automation, virtualization, and compute/storage. There is strong support for knowledge sharing, continuous learning, and certifications – and we encourage you to deepen or broaden your expertise in the areas that interest you.
   

  

**What will help you thrive in this role** 
  

  

 You are someone who takes pride in delivering high-quality work and enjoys collaborating with others to solve complex challenges. You are curious, open to learning, and comfortable sharing your ideas and perspectives.
   

  

 You communicate clearly and thoughtfully, helping create trust with both customers and colleagues. You value teamwork, inclusion, and continuous improvement – and contribute to a positive and supportive working environment.
   

  

 Your experience:
   

  

* Several years of experience within networking/security.
* Cisco certification at Professional level, or equivalent hands-on experience.
* Good understanding of multi-tenant solutions within network and data center environments.
* Experience with VMware virtualization (NSX-T) and vCloud Director.
* You communicate fluently in both Swedish and English.
* Experience working according to ITIL frameworks.


 Additional qualifications (preferred):
   

  

* Knowledge of underlay technologies.
* Experience with Fortinet firewalls or similar platforms.
* Experience with automation tools such as Ansible.


**Why Telia Cygate?** 
  

  

 At Telia Cygate, we’re not only experts in networks, security, and various types of cloud solutions – we’re also a team that believes work should be fun!
   

  

 As part of Telia Company, we have the strength to create real impact on a large scale, contribute to societal value, and help our customers navigate the world of digitalization. And we always do it with warmth, care, and a smile. Here, it’s our ideas and diverse perspectives that make us strong, and together we ensure that the world of technology becomes a place where everyone feels good – and where you belong.
   

  

  

  

 Your development matters to us. We encourage continuous learning and make sure that you and your interests are in focus. We know that people are the heart of our company, which is why we value joy, creativity, and different perspectives in everything we do.
   

  

 Welcome to grow together with us – where we make technology human and create real impact!
   

  

  

  

**Telia Cygate** 
**is proud to be** 
**certificated** 
**as** 
**Great** 
**Place to** 
**Work!** 
  

  

 With us, people are at the center – here you get the chance to grow, be challenged, and thrive together with dedicated colleagues. We are building a culture where security, togetherness, and opportunities go hand in hand. Do you want to be part of the journey? Welcome to a workplace that truly lives up to its name.
   

  

  

  

**What we offer** 
  

  

 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.
   

  

  

  

**Interested? Apply!** 
  

  

 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **2026-07-10.** 
 Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!
   

  

  

  

**Location:** 
 Solna, Stockholm
   

  

  

  

 If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our
 **Talent Acquisition Partner.** 
  

  

 Background and reference checks will be part of the process.
   

  

  

  

 Want to know more about this role?
   

  

 Please reach out to Greg Szuh at gergely.szuh@cygate.se
   

  

  

  

 We kindly ask recruitment agencies and external vendors not to contact us regarding this position.
   

  

  

  

**Equal opportunities** 
  

  

 At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.
   

  

  

  

**Welcome to Telia** 

**Cygate** 
**– Home of** 

**Experts**

title: Forward Deployed Engineer
description:
**We're hiring a Forward Deployed Engineer to take our AI voice agents out of the lab and into the real world.** 




  
 



 Most engineers ship a product and hope it holds up. You'll be the one sitting with the client when it has to. You'll be embedded with the US collections teams whose whole operation depends on getting this right, call after call.
 



  
 



 The debt collection industry is still stuck on technical debt, manual processes, and a consumer experience that's all over the place. Nobody has fixed it, even though billions in unpaid invoices and the personal finances of millions of people run through it every year. We're changing that by deploying state-of-the-art AI voice agents for clients in the US. We're a full-stack, AI-native company, and we build the technology we run on ourselves.
 



  
 



 If you want to be where the tech actually meets reality, this is the role.
 



  
 



**WHY CORAFONE** 




 • A founding team that has built companies before and knows what it takes
 



 • Backed by leading Silicon Valley VCs:
 



 - Boost VC (Coinbase, Deepgram)
 



 - Theory Forge VC (Moltbook founders)
 



 - Shanda Group ($8bn AUM)
 



 • Founded in 2025, and we've already collected over $4.6m across 550,000+ interactions with a fail rate under 0.01%
 



  
 



**WHAT YOU'LL DO** 




 • Work directly with US clients to deploy and configure our voice agents around their workflows, systems, and compliance requirements
 



 • Own the integrations that make a deployment real: telephony, payments, CRMs, client data
 



 • Take a messy, half-defined client request and turn it into something shipped, fast
 



 • Be the technical face to clients in an industry that runs on trust
 



 • Debug live in production, with real consumers and real money involved
 



 • Bring what you learn in the field back into the core product so the next deployment is easier
 



  
 



**WHO YOU ARE** 




 • A strong full-stack engineer (TypeScript) who can own a deployment from start to finish
 



 • Happier solving the real problem in front of a client than polishing something in a vacuum. Ambiguity doesn't throw you.
 



 • You've integrated with external systems and APIs before. Telephony or payments is a big plus.
 



 • You stay calm when something breaks in production
 



 • A genuinely good communicator. You can sit with a CTO and a compliance officer in the same meeting and handle both.
 



 • Fine working across US client hours, and traveling when a deployment needs you on site
 



  
 



**NICE TO HAVE** 




 • You've done forward deployed, solutions, or deployment engineering before
 



 • A background in a regulated industry like fintech, payments, or collections
 



 • You've put AI or voice systems in front of real users
 



  
 



**WHAT YOU'LL GET** 




 • A front-row view of the clients shaping our product, and the visibility that comes with that
 



 • The chance to come in early enough to influence the product, the deployment playbook, and the culture
 



 • Ownership on seed-stage terms, before the valuation catches up to what we're building
 



 • A world-class tech company out of the Nordics, with global ambitions

title: Enterprise Account Executive - Expansion
description:
At Snowflake, we are powering the era of the agentic enterprise. To usher in this new era, we seek AI-native thinkers across every function who are energized by the opportunity to reinvent how they work. You don’t just use tools; you possess an innate curiosity, treating AI as a high-trust collaborator that is core to how you solve problems and accelerate your impact. We look for low-ego individuals who thrive in dynamic and fast-moving environments and move with an experimental mindset — who rapidly test emerging capabilities to discover simpler, more powerful ways to deliver results. At Snowflake, your role isn't just to execute a function, but to help redefine the future of how work gets done.
   

  

 The Enterprise Account Executive - Insurance is responsible for building client relationships with enterprise businesses within a specified region. People who excel at this job have the ability to prospect, develop, and close business within a timely manner while focusing on the clients’ requirements. The Enterprise AE's must have the confidence and ability to negotiate and close agreements with clients and support new customers through our on-boarding process.
   

  

 This role is a unique opportunity to contribute in a meaningful way to high visibility, high impact projects at a very exciting time for the company. Snowflake is an innovative, high-growth, customer-focused company in a large and growing market. If you are an energetic, self-managed professional with experience managing a complex sales process and possess excellent presentation and listening skills, organization and contact management capabilities, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**AS AN ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE AT SNOWFLAKE YOU WILL:**
* Achieve sales quotas for allocated accounts and/or territory on a quarterly and annual basis by developing a sales strategy in the allocated territory with a target prospect list, and a regional sales plan.
* Develop marketing plans with the marketing team to drive revenue growth.
* Be the trusted advisor to the customer by understanding their existing and future IT roadmap to drive the Snowflake solution within the marketplace.
* Prospect qualification and the development of new sales opportunities and ongoing revenue streams.
* Arrange and conduct initial Executive and CxO discussions and positioning meetings.
* Sales process management and opportunity closure.
* Ongoing account management to ensure customer satisfaction and drive additional revenue streams.
* Be familiar with solution-based approach to selling, have experience managing a complex sales process and possess excellent presentation and listening skills, organization and contact management capabilities.


**OUR IDEAL ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE WILL HAVE:**
* 8+ years of field sales experience preferred with an emphasis on data or cloud related technology.
* 5+ year’s experience focussed on generating new business within Enterprise accounts.
* Proven ability to independently manage, develop, and close new client relationships.
* Experience hitting quota of $1M+ of ARR per year and experience on averaging 8+ face to face meetings per week.
* New business sales focus.
* A track record of success in driving consistent activity, pipeline development and quota achievement.
* Experience determining customer requirements and presenting appropriate solutions.
* Pro-active, independent thinker with high energy and a positive attitude.
* Excellent verbal and written communication, presentation, and relationship management skills.
* Ability to thrive in fast-paced startup environment.
* Executive level relationship management.
* Ability to understand the "bigger picture" and the business drivers around IT.
* BA/BS required.


**BONUS POINTS FOR EXPERIENCE WITH THE FOLLOWING:**
* Industry specific experience - Telco & Hospitality are highly advantageous.
* Experience implementing MEDDPICC.
* Experience selling software or cloud based applications to the Enterprise is desired.


 Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.
   

  

 How do you want to make your impact?
   

  

 For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com

title: Delprojektledare / lösningsarkitekt - införande av systemstöd i vården
description:
Vi söker dig som vill vara med och bidra i ett av Region Stockholms viktigaste utvecklingsprojekt – att designa och införa Stockholms nya journalsystem.
   

  





**Om tjänsten**




 Som projektledare har du en nyckelroll i ett av Region Stockholms viktigaste digitaliseringsuppdrag som kommer att påverka framtiden för patienter och vårdens medarbetare i Stockholm. Uppdraget är centralt för att stärka patientsäkerhet, effektivitet och digitalisering i vården. Projektet är omfattande och det kommer att finnas många delprojekt och arbetsströmmar som ska ledas. Du och projektet säkerställer att systemet anpassas efter vårdens behov och att integrationer och teknik utformas, så att vården får ett välfungerande hållbart system.
   

  





 Det är en roll med stora kontaktytor, och det gäller att fånga upp avgörande begränsningar och förutsättningar i vår stora organisation. Tempot kan ofta vara högt och det är många inblandade personer från olika delar av regionen med olika bakgrund och behov. Du arbetar såväl med verksamheterna som med leverantörer och centrala förvaltningar, för nu skapar vi den nya it miljön för vården i Stockholm.
   

  





 Arbetsuppgifterna omfattar bland annat:
 


* Leda stora delprojekt och centrala utredningsuppdrag, ofta tillsammans med både tekniskt och kliniskt verksamma medarbetare från regionen.
* Starta och leda nya arbetsströmmar och analysuppdrag, ibland parallellt med pågående arbetsströmmar.
* Arbeta analytiskt kring lösningar.
* Ta fram beslutsunderlag och konsekvensanalyser i komplexa frågeställningar och vägval.
* Säkerställa nära samarbete med leverantören.



**Vem är du?**




 För att passa för rollen ser vi att du har utbildning från universitet eller högskola inom relevant område eller har förvärvat motsvarande kompetens genom lång och relevant yrkeserfarenhet. Du har mångårig arbetslivserfarenhet som projektledare alternativt
 
 lösningsarktitekt inom it i hälso- och sjukvården. Du har stor vana att arbeta med it utveckling runt vårdens it miljö och du har god kännedom om vårdens behov av information och it-stöd. Du har därtill vana att leda delprojekt med många involverade vårdgivare i hälso- och sjukvården och du har förmåga att ha flera pågående uppdrag parallellt. Vi förutsätter att du har mycket god kunskap om vårdens it miljöer och de vanligaste systemen.
   

  





 Du har förmågan att hålla ihop många arbetsströmmar, styra mot tidplan och vara lyhörd mot verksamheternas behov, men ser också hur tekniska förutsättningar kan vara avgörande i vissa vägval. När behoven och frågeställningarna är många kan du prioritera, planera och skapa struktur. Du är dessutom lyhörd och har god samarbetsförmåga vilket vi ser som avgörande för att lyckas i rollen. Vidare har du god förmåga till problemlösning och planering och har ett konstruktivt och positivt förhållningssätt, även vid motgångar. Du har lätt för att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska och kan anpassa ditt budskap efter mottagaren. Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  





 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet att arbeta med Cosmic, som blir vårt nya journalsystem. Och det är meriterande om arbetat med införande och utveckling av journalsystem för vården i en region. 
   

  





**Vårt erbjudande**




 Vi har kollektivavtal och med det följer kollektivavtalade försäkringar, tjänstepension och möjlighet till löneväxling. För att du ska kunna ta ansvar för din hälsa erbjuder vi friskvårdstimme och friskvårdsbidrag samt subventionerad sjukvård i form av kostnadsfri öppensjukvård. Flexibel arbetstid och möjlighet till att arbeta hemifrån har vi för att underlätta för dig att få ihop vardagen. Här kan du läsa mer om förmånerna i vårt kollektivavtal.
   

  





 Vi kommer från hösten att sitta i Karolinskas lokaler i Solna.
   

  





**Ansökan**




 Låter det här som något för dig ser vi gärna att du söker så snart som möjligt, intervjuer kan ske löpande. För en komplett ansökan räcker det med att bifoga ditt CV. När du ansöker kommer du att få besvara ett antal frågor, dessa ersätter personligt brev.
   

  





 Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta enhetschef Gertrud Ocklin: gertrud.ocklin@regionstockholm.se.
   

  





 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  





 Regionledningskontoret stödjer regionstyrelsen i uppgiften att leda, styra, samordna och följa upp Region Stockholms verksamheter. Förvaltningen arbetar strategiskt och operativt utifrån ett koncernperspektiv och ger regionstyrelsen de underlag och det stöd den behöver i sitt uppdrag att utveckla Region Stockholm. Regionledningskontoret ansvarar även för stöd till klimat- och regionutvecklingsnämnden samt för verksamhetsstödjande tjänster inom koncernen. Läs mer här
   

  





****Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm****




 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  





 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  





 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  





 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.
   

  





 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm

title: SAP SD/MM Solution Architect
description:
You work on SAP consulting projects focused on
 **sales and distribution and material management** 
 designing and implementing solutions based on
 **SAP SD/MM** 
 . You take ownership of defined work streams and contribute to high‑quality, end‑to‑end SAP implementations in international project environments. You collaborate closely with customers and project teams to translate business needs into robust SAP solutions.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities**
* Lead the design of end-to-end SAP solution architectures based on SAP SD/MM
* Translate business strategies and transformation goals into scalable, integrated SAP solution designs
* Own solution architecture decisions across projects, ensuring alignment with best practices, standards, and long-term roadmap
* Act as a trusted advisor to senior stakeholders, including C‑level executives, and guide them through solution options and trade-offs
* Lead and mentor consultants and developers, ensuring solution quality and consistency across work streams
* Support pre-sales activities, including solution architecture design, estimations, and client presentations


**Your Skills And Experience**
* Minimum 9-10+ years of relevant experience in SAP SD/MM
* Proven track record in leading complex SAP transformation projects
* Functional and/or technical proficiency with at least 4 full-cycle SAP implementations
* Strong cross-module expertise to design robust end-to-end logistics solutions
* Strong configuration and solution design skills with a holistic architectural mindset
* Strong consulting and stakeholder management skills, including C‑level interaction
* Experience working across multiple industries with a good understanding of sales and distribution and material management processes
* Strong experience in pre-sales and business development activities
* Strategic thinking combined with strong project and solution leadership capabilities
* SAP certifications in SD/MM are an advantage
* Experience in Public Cloud is an advantage
* Experience with SAP’s integration and transformation toolchain, such as Signavio, LeanIX, SAP Cloud ALM, and WalkMe
* Strong commitment to knowledge sharing, mentoring, and building organizational capabilities
* Designs AI-enabled SAP solutions conceptually (e.g. process automation, embedded AI, analytics)
* Evaluates AI use cases, risks, and governance with customers


**General Requirements**
* Excellent communication, presentation, and facilitation skills in English and Swedish
* Excellent analytical, conceptual, and problem‑solving skills
* Proven ability to deliver high-quality results and support client outcomes
* Willingness to travel depending on project requirements


**What We Offer**
* Partnership culture with the opportunity for co‑ownership in a 100% employee‑owned company
* A diverse and versatile role with real opportunities to shape your career in an entrepreneurial environment
* Inspiring, inclusive, and supportive global working culture
* Open communication, trust, and regular feedback within a flat organizational structure
* Opportunity to work on complex and innovative projects across multiple industries.
* Competitive remuneration package
* Flexible working hours and a hybrid working model


**Interested? Then, don't hesitate to apply!**
**This Is WE**
 Committed to innovation, since 1969 Westernacher Consulting operates worldwide, with more than 1000 consultants in Europe, Asia and the Americas. We provide global business and SAP consulting, serving medium to large sized enterprises striving for innovation, operational excellence and profitable, sustainable growth. Headquartered in Heidelberg, Germany, Westernacher Consulting is the global leader in business process and technology innovation.
   

  

 Living, working, and operating in partnership. We are inquisitive, creative thinkers with a strong entrepreneurial spirit. We question new ways of working, think differently and are willing to try out new approaches to create value and innovation for our customers. All of this makes us pioneers in our field and keeps us responsive, quality-focused and results-oriented.
   

  

 Westernacher is a diverse work environment and is proud to be an equal-opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status. Westernacher is also committed to compliance with all fair employment practices regarding citizenship and immigration status.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Domänarkitekt
description:
*Vill du vara med och forma framtidens utvecklarupplevelse? Hos oss får du chansen att bygga hjärtat i vår digitala transformation – plattformar och verktyg som driver innovation, säkerhet och användarvänlighet. Som domänarkitekt agerar du också i rollen som tågarkitekt och blir en central kraft i att skapa en världsledande utvecklingsmiljö där DevSecOps och molntransformation står i fokus. Tillsammans med engagerade kollegor bygger du grunden för nästa generations digitala tjänster. Är du redo att ta ledartröjan och inspirera till innovation och kvalitet?*
**Om jobbet**
 Som domänarkitekt är du en nyckelperson både i linjeorganisationen, där du ansvarar för arkitekturen inom domänen Process & Dev Tool, och i tågledningen, där du främst arbetar på taktisk nivå i nära samarbete med såväl strategisk som operativ nivå. Inom Process & Dev Tools möjliggör vi systemutveckling i världsklass och lägger grunden för effektiva, säkra och skalbara lösningar genom att etablera principer, plattformar, processer och arbetssätt som skapar en modern och hållbar utvecklingsmiljö.
   

  

 Du ansvarar för att definiera och kommunicera en gemensam teknisk och arkitekturell vision för tåget och säkerställer att de system som används och utvecklas passar för sitt syfte och stödjer vår övergripande strategi. Du leder och utvecklar tågets arkitekturella runway, bidrar till planering och prioritering och coachar teamen för att säkerställa att lösningarna håller hög kvalitet och följer den arkitekturella visionen. Du samarbetar med Product Manager, RTE, Business Owners, team, arkitekter och andra intressenter för att säkerställa att våra mål och planer är väl förankrade och att vi håller jämn takt med teknisk skuld. Du är både rådgivare och inspiratör, och driver det tekniska arbetet framåt med moderna metoder och ett DevSecOps-mindset.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Ansvara för att utveckla och kommunicera den tekniska och arkitekturella visionen för tåget
* Säkerställa att arkitekturella behov och möjliggörare (enablers) hanteras i backloggen
* Samverka med tågledningen och relevanta intressenter för att planera, prioritera och koordinera tekniska lösningar
* Bidra till att lösningar håller hög kvalitet och är i linje med verksamhetens mål och strategier
* Coacha utvecklingsteam och främja ett ständigt lärande kring arkitektur och kvalitet
* Tillsammans med resterande tågledning styra tåget för att utveckla rätt lösning utifrån en helhetssyn med utgångspunkt i omvärldens och kundernas framtida behov
* Säkerställa kravställning gentemot leverantör
* Utforma och förvalta "Golden Path" för utveckling och leverans på plattformen, inklusive automatiserade säkerhetskontroller, policy enforcement och audit trails
* Driva kontinuerlig förbättring av plattformens säkerhets- och compliancefunktioner, samt utbilda och stötta utvecklingsteamen i bästa praxis
* Ta en ledarroll i det tekniska arbetet och inspirera till innovation och kvalitet
* Kommunicera och förklara komplexa tekniska frågor på ett pedagogiskt och lättförståeligt sätt för olika målgrupper, samt agera mentor och coach för teamen


 Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:
   

  

* Akademisk utbildning inom datateknik, systemvetenskap, IT eller liknande
* Djup och bred teknisk erfarenhet av systemutveckling och DevSecOps, gärna i större organisationer
* Erfarenhet av att implementera CI/CD och automatiserade pipelines
* Stark förståelse för DevSecOps, automatisering samt security och compliance by design
* Erfarenhet av att implementera och övervaka säkerhets- och compliancekrav i moln- och containerplattformar
* God kunskap om säkerhetsverktyg (t.ex. SAST, DAST, secrets management, IAM) och compliance-ramverk, gärna inom bank och finans
* Kunskap om API-strategier och integrationsmönster
* Förmåga att dokumentera och hålla arkitektur och mönster uppdaterade
* Agilt mindset och erfarenhet av att arbeta enligt SAFe eller liknande ramverk
* Mycket god samarbetsförmåga, lyhördhet och ödmjukhet – du övertygar med väl underbyggda argument och söker alltid den bästa lösningen för helheten
* Förmåga att kommunicera och samarbeta med både tekniska och icke-tekniska intressenter
* Starkt ledarskap och förmåga att motivera, engagera och utveckla andra
* Pedagogisk skicklighet – du kan förklara komplexa tekniska frågor på ett enkelt och tydligt sätt för både tekniska och icke-tekniska intressenter
* Svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


 Meriterande är även om du har:
   

  

* Kunskap inom Azure- och OpenShift/Kubernetes-arkitektur
* Erfarenhet av nätverk, monitorering, logg- och eventhantering
* Kunskap om Key Management, certifikat, autentisering, auktorisering och IAM
* Erfarenhet av IDP-lösningar


 Som person är du nyfiken, drivande och har ett stort engagemang för teknik och utveckling. Du har lätt för att samarbeta och trivs med att arbeta i team, samtidigt som du gärna tar initiativ och leder andra framåt. Du är kommunikativ, pedagogisk och har förmågan att inspirera både tekniska och icke-tekniska kollegor. Du har ett agilt och lösningsorienterat förhållningssätt, är prestigelös och ser alltid till helheten. Din analytiska förmåga och ditt strukturerade arbetssätt gör att du kan hantera komplexa frågor och fatta välgrundade beslut.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef:Charlotta.Haldin@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena:Jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen:Lisa-Maria.Carensjo@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Digital & IT är hjärtat i Länsförsäkringsgruppens digitala utveckling. Vi driver den gemensamma digitala transformationen och levererar förstklassiga IT-lösningar, datadrivna insikter och innovativa digitala tjänster som skapar värde för hela verksamheten. Vårt uppdrag är att bygga en robust och framtidssäker IT-miljö – både på plats och i molnet – som möjliggör kundnära och effektiva affärer i hela gruppen.
   

  

 Hos oss möts teknik, affär och innovation. Vi arbetar tvärfunktionellt ute i verksamheten i agila team där utveckling, drift och strategi går hand i hand. Vi ansvarar för allt från IT-styrning, enterprisearkitektur och leverantörshantering till applikationsutveckling, cybersäkerhet och verksamhetsberedskap.

title: Automation Engineer (Information Security)
description:
**About Gelato** 




  





 Gelato has created the world’s largest global network for on-demand production of custom products – from t-shirts and mugs to books and wall art. We empower a new generation of ecommerce entrepreneurs to share their creativity worldwide while embracing local, sustainable production. By producing locally and perfectly matching supply with demand, we eliminate waste and reduce carbon emissions.
 



  





 At Gelato, we don’t own production facilities – we build the software that connects them. With over 140 production partners in 32 countries, our network can deliver custom products to five billion people in just 72 hours. It’s smarter, faster, and greener.
 



  





 With GelatoConnect, our SaaS platform, we’re driving innovation in print production. GelatoConnect simplifies operations for print producers by automating procurement, workflows, and logistics into one seamless system. By boosting efficiency and cutting costs, it helps businesses scale to meet market demands. With GelatoConnect, we’re reshaping the print industry to be more efficient, sustainable, and profitable.
 



  





**Platform** 




  





 Gelato is an AI-first, cloud-native platform transforming local, on-demand production and delivery — with zero physical assets. We power:
 


* **Global production orchestration:** 
 connecting e-commerce customers to 130+ partners across 32 countries. From AI-guided design to smart routing and logistics, we deliver to over 5 billion people in under 72 hours — faster, greener, smarter.
* **GelatoConnect:** 
 our AI-driven print production OS that helps producers master digital printing — from inventory to shipping — by automating every step: procurement, prepress, printing, packaging, and dispatch.



  





**AI at the core** 




  





 We are not just early adopters of AI — we’re AI-native builders. Security at Gelato is no different: we don’t just use AI tools, we build them into everything we do.
 


* AI-first security operations using LLMs for alert triage, threat summarisation, runbook drafting, and incident documentation.
* Autonomous AI agents driving detection, alerting, and response orchestration across our security tooling.
* A culture of continuous experimentation — we actively encourage using AI to go further, faster, without cutting corners on rigour.



  





**The position** 




  





 As Gelato continues its global expansion, we are seeking an Automation Engineer to join our growing security function. This is a hands-on, builder-focused role centred on designing, building, and shipping the AI and automation that multiplies what our security team can do. Rather than triaging alerts by hand, you’ll build the systems that triage them.
 



  





 Working closely with the Head of Information Security and the wider security team, you’ll turn manual, repetitive security work into reliable automated workflows and intelligent agents. You’ll integrate our security tooling, wire up LLM-driven pipelines, and create the automation that keeps the business safe at scale.
 



  





 You don’t need to have built everything before. You need strong engineering instincts, genuine curiosity, and the drive to ship. You’ll have a clear path to grow your skills across security engineering, AI/agent development, and detection-and-response automation.
 



 Our security team operates as enablers, not blockers — your job is to build the tooling that keeps the business safe without slowing it down.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 




  





**Security automation engineering** 



* Design, build, and maintain automation that removes manual toil across detection, triage, response, and reporting.
* Integrate security tooling (SIEM, EDR, IAM, cloud, ticketing) into seamless, reliable automated workflows.
* Build and maintain SOAR-style playbooks and pipelines for enrichment, containment, and response.
* Own the deployment, monitoring, and reliability of the automation you ship.



**AI and agent development** 



* Build LLM-powered tools and autonomous agents for alert triage, threat summarisation, runbook generation, and incident documentation.
* Develop and refine prompts, guardrails, and evaluations to make AI workflows safe and dependable in production.
* Prototype, test, and ship AI-assisted approaches to threat hunting, log analysis, and security operations.



**Tooling and integrations** 



* Develop integrations and APIs that connect security tools to internal systems and data sources.
* Write clean, maintainable, well-tested code.
* Maintain and improve internal libraries, documentation, and shared automation infrastructure.



**Collaboration and enablement** 



* Partner with the security team to identify the highest-leverage automation opportunities.
* Document workflows clearly so the team can operate, trust, and extend what you build.
* Automate evidence collection and control testing for compliance frameworks including ISO 27001, SOC 2, and NIST CSF.



  





**Requirements** 




  




* 2–4 years of experience in software engineering, automation/DevOps, security engineering, or a related hands-on building role — including internships, apprenticeships, or equivalent practical exposure.
* Strong scripting and programming skills, particularly in Python, with a track record of building integrations against APIs.
* Experience building automation workflows — whether through SOAR platforms, CI/CD, or workflow orchestration tools (e.g. n8n, Tines, Zapier).
* AI-native working style — practical, hands-on experience building with LLMs (APIs, prompt engineering, and ideally agents), not just using them as a chat assistant.
* Comfortable working in cloud environments, particularly AWS — you understand IAM, logging, and serverless or container-based deployment.
* A solid grasp of core security concepts (the incident response lifecycle, common vulnerability classes, attack frameworks such as MITRE ATT&CK), or the curiosity and drive to ramp up quickly.
* Clear written and verbal communication in English; able to document systems and decisions for both technical and non-technical audiences.



  





**Good to have** 




  




* Experience with SOAR or workflow-automation platforms (Tines, Torq, n8n, or similar).
* Hands-on experience deploying AI agents or LLM-powered applications in production.
* Familiarity with security tooling such as SIEM, EDR, WAF, or vulnerability scanners (Semgrep, SonarQube, Coana, etc.).
* Experience with infrastructure-as-code (Terraform), containers, and CI/CD pipelines.
* Familiarity with compliance frameworks such as ISO 27001, SOC 2, or NIST CSF.
* Relevant certifications — cloud (AWS), security (CompTIA Security+, CySA+), or equivalent; though we consider demonstrated experience over credentials.
* Degree in Computer Science, Information Security, or a related field — though we value demonstrated experience over credentials.



  





**What it's like to work at Gelato** 




  





 We are a customer-obsessed team with the ambition to change the world by connecting technology to the printing industry and making it much more sustainable. Everyone who joins our team must feel genuinely intrigued and motivated by our mission. We expect a lot. We are a driven team with big goals, so we seek individuals who are genuinely passionate about their work and possess an entrepreneurial spirit. Our culture is unique and we live by our values, so it's worth learning more about our culture and how we work before presenting your application.
 



  





 At Gelato, we pride ourselves on our global presence with 14 offices worldwide, fostering a dynamic and diverse work environment. Rooted in a culture that values collaboration, creativity, and camaraderie, we actively cultivate a company culture that thrives on shared experiences. We encourage team members to embrace this culture by working from our inspiring office spaces at least three days a week, allowing for meaningful connections and collective growth.
 



  





 Lastly, we ask that you please upload your CV in English, regardless of which country you are applying from.

title: Senior Partner Sales Account Manager - Global System Integrators (CENE Region)
description:
**About The Job**
 The Red Hat Partner Ecosystem team seeks a Senior Partner Sales Account Manager to join us in Sweden, Denmark, Norway or Finland. The Partner Ecosystem Success team is a force multiplier. We focus on growing and enabling a vital ecosystem of partners who use Red Hat technology with or in their solutions, provide services for Red Hat products, or sell their solutions to end customers.
   

  

 Associates in the PAM role are at the heart of our ecosystem mission. You will be joining a community of partner account professionals who are highly trained and experienced in business, technical and partner selling skills. This role serves not only as a facilitator but also as a key catalyst in driving and achieving Red Hat's goals through partner growth.
   

  

 We are looking for a Senior PAM to be focused on our Global System Integrator partners in the Region Central, East, North Eastern Europe (CENE) with a current focus on Accenture, CapGemini, Infosys, TCS, HCL.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 Develop and manage long-term strategic relationships with those partners, serving as the primary liaison and the 'face' of Red Hat for those partners.
   

  

* Serve as a trusted advisor to partners, providing guidance on Red Hat technologies, market opportunities, and joint go-to-market strategies.
* Develop and execute joint strategic plans using Red Hat’s Partner Success Planning Tools and methodology.
* Collaborate with partners to agree on, measure, and track a set of Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to ensure the partnership is on track to meet its goals.
* Conduct quarterly and annual business reviews with the partners, involving key stakeholders from Red Hat and the partners.
* Identify and help foster relationships between C-level executives at the partners organization and Red Hat.


 Encourage partners to commit to joint initiatives by adopting Red Hat products, promoting / selling to their customers or building them into repeatable solutions.
   

  

* Develop a business & value case for the partners to pursue a new joint solution or line of business in collaboration with Red Hat.
* Collaborate with the partners to showcase the value of our products, highlighting how they can be seamlessly integrated into their solutions to address their customers' business challenges and drive meaningful outcomes.
* Identify key partners, decision-makers and marshal efforts to win their buy-in, investment and business growth focus.
* Promote the partners solutions and capabilities by executing a joint Go-To-Market plan both to customers and Red Hat


 Enable Partner-driven Growth and Success
   

  

* Develop and implement strategies to generate new incremental joint pipeline opportunities with partners to include reporting on performance (pipeline, certifications, revenue)
* Identify potential markets and verticals for new pipeline growth in collaboration with partners.
* Facilitate bi-directional lead pass and coordinate introductions between partner and Red Hat customer account teams.
* Track and measure partner-sourced opportunities through a robust deal registration process.
* Assist field sales teams in identifying and developing opportunities through partners.
* Work closely with partners and field sales teams to close deals and achieve sales targets.
* Regularly update and review the opportunity pipeline with partners to ensure alignment and progress.
* Deliver precise and timely forecasts of partner-generated opportunities and sales back to the business.
* Analyze data to predict trends and inform strategic planning.
* Leverage the Red Hat Partner Program to build the partners loyalty, focus, commitment and incremental revenue growth - leading to autonomous selling and incremental revenue growth


 Drive partner enablement on Red Hat products and their use in joint solutions
   

  

* Ensure the partners have sales and technical capability to successfully sell and promote Red Hat offerings
* Guide partners in building repeatable offerings/IP aligned to TDPs (Technical Decision Points)
* Support the partners in building or integrating Red Hat products into their solution, working with both Partner and Red Hat Development/Engineering teams.
* Coordinate training and enablement plans for partners service delivery teams to ensure sufficient technical enablement to deliver Red Hat products successfully.
* Educate the partners on Red Hat Sales plays / TDPs, campaigns, launches, and enablement initiatives
* Ensure partner certifications and readiness by focus TDPs
* Work with the partners to develop services capabilities (Red Hat Specialized Partner - RHSP)
* Advocate internally for the partners
* Partner Program management & program leverage including RHSP


 Delivery of key outcomes which contribute to the success metrics of this role
   

  

* Increased skills and scale of your partners
* Measurable incremental pipeline through or with your partners
* Achievement of annual recurring revenue targets, through or with your partners
* Advocacy and increased mindshare for your partners internally and externally
* Joint Case studies and references
* Number of Design wins and repeatable solutions


**What You Will Bring**
* Strong track record of building strategic relationships and developing the business with Global System Integrators, coupled with the ability to create joint business plans that deliver measurable outcomes.
* Proven history of consistently meeting and exceeding revenue targets through effective partner collaboration.
* Ability to translate partner business needs into joint solutions and manage those initiatives.
* Experience working with complex ecosystems.
* Ability to grow channel ecosystem in a multi-product company
* Experience ensuring results through business partners and the ability to inspire partner executive trust in Red Hat.
* Demonstrated experience in driving technology sales and solution adoption with partners.
* Works well in heavily matrixed environments.
* Willingness to travel across geo up to 50%;
* Excellent communication skills in English, regional language preferred.


**About Red Hat**
 Red Hat is the world’s leading provider of enterprise open source software solutions, using a community-powered approach to deliver high-performing Linux, cloud, container, and Kubernetes technologies. Spread across 40+ countries, our associates work flexibly across work environments, from in-office, to office-flex, to fully remote, depending on the requirements of their role. Red Hatters are encouraged to bring their best ideas, no matter their title or tenure. We're a leader in open source because of our open and inclusive environment. We hire creative, passionate people ready to contribute their ideas, help solve complex problems, and make an impact.
   

  

**Inclusion at Red Hat**
 Red Hat’s culture is built on the open source principles of transparency, collaboration, and inclusion, where the best ideas can come from anywhere and anyone. When this is realized, it empowers people from different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences to come together to share ideas, challenge the status quo, and drive innovation. Our aspiration is that everyone experiences this culture with equal opportunity and access, and that all voices are not only heard but also celebrated. We hope you will join our celebration, and we welcome and encourage applicants from all the beautiful dimensions that compose our global village.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Policy (EEO)**
 Red Hat is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and an affirmative action employer. We review applications for employment without regard to their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, veteran status, genetic information, physical or mental disability, medical condition, marital status, or any other basis prohibited by law.
   

  

 Red Hat does not seek or accept unsolicited resumes or CVs from recruitment agencies. We are not responsible for, and will not pay, any fees, commissions, or any other payment related to unsolicited resumes or CVs except as required in a written contract between Red Hat and the recruitment agency or party requesting payment of a fee.
   

  

 Red Hat supports individuals with disabilities and provides reasonable accommodations to job applicants. If you need assistance completing our online job application, email application-assistance@redhat.com. General inquiries, such as those regarding the status of a job application, will not receive a reply.

title: Client Executive
description:
Drivs du av att göra affärer och bygga långsiktiga kundrelationer? Vill du arbeta nära företag i deras utveckling och vara med och forma skräddarsydda finansieringslösningar? Nu söker vi en Client executive till vårt Corporate-team i Stockholm.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som kundansvarig på Norion Bank arbetar du med medelstora företag och ansvarar för att bygga upp och utveckla en egen kundportfölj. Du arbetar nära kundernas ledning och ägare, identifierar finansieringsbehov och driver hela kreditprocessen – från första kontakt till uppföljning.
   

  

 Du erbjuds en affärsnära roll med stort eget ansvar, där du kombinerar relationsbyggande med analys och affärsmässighet.
   

  

**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**
* Prospektera och etablera nya kundrelationer
* Analysera kunders finansieringsbehov
* Strukturera och föreslå skräddarsydda finansieringslösningar
* Driva kreditprocessen: förhandling, kreditberedning och beslut
* Säkerställa avtal, utbetalning och administration
* Följa upp och utveckla befintliga kundrelationer


 Du arbetar i nära samarbete med funktioner som Kredit, Legal och Middle Office.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som har ett starkt affärsdriv och trivs i en roll där du både skapar nya affärer och fördjupar befintliga relationer.
   

  

**Du har:**
* Högskoleexamen inom ekonomi eller motsvarande
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av kreditgivning till medelstora företag
* Erfarenhet av att driva affärer från första kontakt till genomförd affär
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska
* Erfarenhet av reskontrafinansiering/factoring.


 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet från High yield organisation eller Debt advisory.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen är du:**
* Affärsdriven och målinriktad
* Relationsskapande och lyhörd
* Lösningsorienterad med god analytisk förmåga
* Bekväm i prospektering och nykundsbearbetning


**AFFÄRSOMRÅDET NORION BANK**
 Norion Bank är en affärsnära nordisk finansieringsbank, som är specialister på finansieringslösningar för medelstora företag och fastighetsbolag. Norion Bank erbjuder företags- och fastighetskrediter samt factoring och agerar som en stabil partner till bolag som vill ta nästa utvecklingssteg. Norion Bank finns på den svenska, norska, finska och tyska marknaden.
   

  

 I samtliga rekryteringsprocesser genomför Norion Bank bakgrundskontroller på slutkandidaten. Bakgrundskontrollen innefattar bland annat ekonomisk information, juridisk information och bosättningsuppgifter.
   

  

**REKRYTERINGSPROCESSEN**
 Norion Bank kommer att behandla dina personuppgifter i enlighet med gällande dataskyddslagstiftning. Läs mer om vår hantering av personuppgifter och dina rättigheter på https://karriar.norionbank.se/data-privacy
   

  

 Vi vill att vår rekryteringsprocess ska vara rättvis och inkluderande. Därför ber vi dig att inte bifoga foto eller annan information som inte är relevant för tjänsten. Personligt brev är inget krav.
   

  

**Vi undanber oss kontakt med rekryteringsbolag, konsultbolag samt annonsörer i rekryteringen.
   

  

 INTRESSERAD?**
 Kul! Urval och intervjuer sker löpande så ansök redan idag!
   

  

 Frågor? Välkommen att höra av dig till oss! För frågor kring teamet och rollen - kontakta gärna Anna Lannebo, Head of Corporate Stockholm på Anna.lannebo@norionbank.se.
   

  

 För frågor om oss som arbetsgivare eller rekryteringsprocessen kontakta gärna Teresa Åkemar, Chief HR Officer på teresa.akemar@norionbank.se.
   

  

 Norion Bank Group är en affärsnära nordisk finansieringsbank. Genom koncernens varumärken Norion Bank, Walley och Collector erbjuds kundanpassade finansieringstjänster som möter distinkta kundbehov inom tre kundsegment: medelstora företag och fastighetsbolag, handlare och privatpersoner. Som specialist på finansieringslösningar är Norion Bank Group ett ledande komplement till traditionella storbanker, med visionen att vara den främsta nordiska finansieringsbanken inom de utvalda segmenten.
   

  

  

  

 Norion Banks erbjudande omfattar företags- och fastighetskrediter samt factoring för medelstora företag och fastighetsbolag. Genom varumärket Walley erbjuds flexibla betal- och checkoutlösningar till handlare och privatpersoner. Varumärket Collector tillhandahåller privatlån och kreditkort till privatpersoner samt sparkonton för privatpersoner och företag. Norion Bank (tidigare Collector Bank) grundades 1999 och har kontor i Göteborg, Stockholm, Helsingborg, Oslo och Helsingfors. Verksamheten bedrivs genom Norion Bank AB (publ) som är noterat på Nasdaq Stockholm.

title: Account Executive
description:
**About TicketCo** 

 At TicketCo, our vision is to create the best fan journey in the world - from ticket purchase to matchday experience.
 



 We empower ticketing teams with powerful, intuitive technology that simplifies operations, increases revenue, and elevates the customer experience. The ticketing teams behind the scenes are heroes, and they deserve best-in-class tools.
 



 With a leading position in the Nordics and rapid growth in the UK sports market, TicketCo is entering an exciting new chapter. Sweden is a key strategic growth market for us - and Sales plays a critical role in driving new business, expanding our footprint, and winning the right clubs.
 



 We are now looking for a driven Account Executive in Sweden who wants to hunt new business, close meaningful deals, and grow their career in a fast-scaling SaaS company.
 



  




**The Opportunity** 

 You will identify, pursue, and close deals with Swedish sports organisations and event organisers. You will own your pipeline end-to-end: from outbound prospecting to demos to signed contracts. You are not afraid to pick up the phone, walk into a stadium, or pitch at the boardroom table.
 



 You will work closely with Customer Success, Product, and Marketing and carry real revenue targets from day one. For the right person, this role offers rapid career growth into senior sales, team lead, or commercial leadership.
 



  




**What You Will Do** 

 Drive New Business
 


* Own your full sales cycle - from first outreach to signed contract.
* Proactively identify and qualify new club opportunities across Sweden.
* Build and manage a robust pipeline, consistently hitting activity and revenue targets.
* Conduct compelling product demos tailored to each club's commercial goals.
* Negotiate and close deals with decision-makers at all levels - from ticketing managers to CEOs.



 Commercial Strategy & Positioning
 


* Deeply understand each prospect's business model, revenue challenges, and fan engagement goals.
* Position TicketCo as the platform of choice against competing solutions.
* Collaborate with Customer Success to ensure smooth handovers and fast time-to-value.
* Provide market feedback to Product and Marketing based on frontline sales insights.



 Relationship Building
 


* Build a strong personal network across Swedish sports - clubs and leagues.
* Represent TicketCo at industry events, matches, and networking opportunities.
* Act as a brand ambassador for TicketCo in the Swedish market.


**Who You Are** 
* A natural hunter - you are energised by prospecting, pitching, and closing.
* 3–5 years of experience in B2B SaaS sales OR as a Commercial Manager / Revenue-focused role at a professional sports club.
* Genuinely passionate about sports - you understand the world of clubs, fans, and matchday operations from the inside.
* Track record of hitting or exceeding revenue targets in a new business or commercial role.
* Strong communicator and storyteller - you can make complex technology feel simple and relevant.
* Comfortable navigating long sales cycles and multiple stakeholders, from operations to ownership.
* Self-driven, resilient, and comfortable with the uncertainty that comes with hunting new business.
* Fluent in Swedish, with solid working English.
* Experience from SaaS, sports tech, events, media rights, sponsorship, or ticketing is a strong advantage - but if you are coming from a club background with strong commercial instincts, we want to hear from you.



 Experience from SaaS, sports, events, ticketing, or recurring/transaction-based business models is a strong advantage, but not a requirement.
 



  




**Why Join TicketCo Sweden?** 
* Work with the most exciting event organisers in Sweden - and help them grow.
* Carry real revenue responsibility and make a direct commercial impact.
* Competitive salary.
* Strong career progression in a scaling international SaaS company.
* High ownership, autonomy, and trust - we back our people.
* Collaborative and ambitious team culture with colleagues across Nordics and UKI.
* Hybrid flexible setup in Stockholm.
* Travel to clubs, stadiums, and industry events across Sweden and beyond.

title: Account Executive - Enterprise Growth & New Business (Nordics)
description:
Colt provides network, voice and data centre services to thousands of businesses around the world, allowing them to focus on delivering their business goals instead of the underlying infrastructure.
   

  

**Why we need this role**
 Are you a high-performing, hunter-led sales professional with a passion for winning new enterprise business? Do you thrive in building new logo pipelines while also unlocking value in underdeveloped accounts?
   

  

 Colt is hiring an Account Executive covering the Nordics (Sweden, Denmark, Finland, Norway), based from our Stockholm office. This role is focused on driving new business acquisition (60–70%) alongside targeted account development (30–40%), making it ideal for a commercially driven sales professional who enjoys both hunting and strategic account growth.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Drive new logo acquisition across large and mid-market enterprises in the Nordic region, targeting multiple verticals
* Build and execute a strong hunting strategy, identifying, engaging, and converting new opportunities into bookings (ARR)
* Develop and grow dormant or underpenetrated accounts, reactivating relationships and identifying expansion opportunities
* Lead full sales cycles from prospecting through to closing complex enterprise deals
* Build and maintain C-level and senior stakeholder relationships across target accounts
* Deliver upsell, cross-sell, renewals, and upgrades across Colt’s portfolio
* Leverage Colt’s solutions portfolio including:
+ Connectivity (WAN, Ethernet, IP)
+ Cloud connectivity (AWS, Azure, GCP)
+ SD-WAN / SASE / security overlays

* Collaborate with pre-sales, product, and delivery teams to ensure successful deal execution


**What We're Looking For**
* 5–10 years of enterprise B2B sales experience, with a strong emphasis on new business (hunter profile)
* Proven track record of:
+ Winning new logos in large and mid-market enterprises
+ Developing pipeline and closing complex deals
+ Managing and expanding dormant or underperforming accounts

* Strong experience in one or more of:
+ Network/connectivity solutions (WAN, Ethernet, IP)
+ Cloud connectivity (AWS, Azure, GCP)
+ SD-WAN, SASE, and security overlay solutions

* Background in industries such as:
+ Telco / Digital Infrastructure
+ Software / SaaS
+ Cloud & Security

* Demonstrated ability to operate across multiple Nordic markets
* Strong commercial acumen and familiarity with sales methodologies (e.g. MEDDPICC, Challenger, SPIN)
* Self-starter mindset with a high level of accountability, drive, and resilience


**What We Offer You**
**Looking to make a mark?**
 At Colt, you’ll make a difference. Because around here, we empower people. We don’t tell you what to do.
   

  

 Instead, we employ people we trust, who come together across the globe to create intelligent solutions.
   

  

 Our global teams are full of ambitious, driven people, all working together towards one shared purpose: to put the power of the digital universe in the hands of our customers wherever, whenever and however they want.
   

  

 We give our people the opportunity to inspire and lead teams, and work on projects that connect people, cities, businesses, and ideas. We want you to help us change the world, for the better.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusion**
* Inclusion and valuing diversity of thought and experience are at the heart of our culture here at Colt. From day one, you’ll be encouraged to be yourself because we believe that’s what helps our people to thrive. We welcome people with diverse backgrounds and experiences, regardless of their gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, race, religion, disability, neurodiversity, age, marital status, pregnancy status, or place of birth.


**Most Recently We Have**
* Signed the UN Women Empowerment Principles which guide our Gender Action Plan
